<file path=".wrangler/tmp/deploy-sAdYoY/index.js">
var __defProp = Object.defineProperty;
var __name = (target, value) => __defProp(target, "name", { value, configurable: true });

// server/src/room.js
var NoteRoom = class {
  static {
    __name(this, "NoteRoom");
  }
  constructor(state, env) {
    this.state = state;
    this.env = env;
    this._dbReady = null;
  }
  async fetch(request) {
    const url = new URL(request.url);
    const parts = url.pathname.split("/").filter(Boolean);
    if (parts[0] === "ws") {
      if (request.headers.get("Upgrade") !== "websocket") {
        return new Response("WebSocket required", { status: 426 });
      }
      return this._handleWS(request);
    }
    return new Response("not found", { status: 404 });
  }
  // ---------- WebSocket ----------
  async _handleWS(request) {
    const expectedKey = request.headers.get("X-Api-Key-Expected") || null;
    const [client, server] = Object.values(new WebSocketPair());
    const parts = new URL(request.url).pathname.split("/").filter(Boolean);
    const roomId = parts[1] || "";
    this.state.acceptWebSocket(server, [
      roomId,
      JSON.stringify({ expectedKey, authed: false })
    ]);
    return new Response(null, { status: 101, webSocket: client });
  }
  _getMeta(ws) {
    const tags = this.state.getTags(ws);
    if (!tags || !tags[1]) return { expectedKey: null, authed: false };
    try {
      return JSON.parse(tags[1]);
    } catch {
      return { expectedKey: null, authed: false };
    }
  }
  _setAuthed(ws) {
    ws.serializeAttachment({ authed: true });
  }
  _isAuthed(ws) {
    try {
      const att = ws.deserializeAttachment();
      return !!(att && att.authed);
    } catch {
      return false;
    }
  }
  async webSocketMessage(ws, message) {
    try {
      const msg = JSON.parse(message);
      const tags = this.state.getTags(ws);
      const roomId = tags && tags[0] || "";
      const meta = this._getMeta(ws);
      if (!this._isAuthed(ws)) {
        if (msg.type === "auth") {
          const ok = !meta.expectedKey || msg.key === meta.expectedKey;
          if (ok) {
            this._setAuthed(ws);
            ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: "auth_ok" }));
          } else {
            ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: "auth_error", reason: "invalid key" }));
            ws.close(4001, "unauthorized");
          }
        }
        return;
      }
      if (msg.type === "ping") {
        ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: "pong" }));
        return;
      }
      if (msg.type === "sync" && msg.action) {
        const result = await this._handleSync(msg, roomId);
        if (!result.ok) {
          ws.send(JSON.stringify({
            type: "sync_error",
            clientMsgId: msg.clientMsgId || null,
            action: msg.action,
            error: result.error || "sync failed"
          }));
          return;
        }
        const json = JSON.stringify(msg);
        for (const s of this.state.getWebSockets()) {
          if (s !== ws && s.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN && this._isAuthed(s)) {
            s.send(json);
          }
        }
      }
    } catch (e) {
      console.warn("ws message error", e);
    }
  }
  async webSocketClose() {
  }
  async webSocketError() {
  }
  // ---------- DB ----------
  async _ensureDb() {
    if (!this.env.DB) return;
    if (!this._dbReady) {
      this._dbReady = (async () => {
        const stmts = [
          `CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notes (
            id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
            room_id TEXT NOT NULL,
            title TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
            pinned INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
            updated_at TEXT NOT NULL,
            item_order TEXT
          )`,
          `CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS groups (
            id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
            note_id TEXT NOT NULL,
            room_id TEXT NOT NULL,
            title TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '\u30B0\u30EB\u30FC\u30D7',
            created_at TEXT NOT NULL
          )`,
          `CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS blocks (
            id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
            note_id TEXT NOT NULL,
            room_id TEXT NOT NULL,
            text TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
            pinned INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
            created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
            updated_at TEXT NOT NULL,
            group_id TEXT,
            group_order INTEGER
          )`,
          // エイリアスはルーム単位で管理
          `CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS aliases (
            room_id TEXT NOT NULL,
            key     TEXT NOT NULL,
            text    TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
            PRIMARY KEY (room_id, key)
          )`,
          `CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_notes_room   ON notes(room_id, updated_at)`,
          `CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_groups_note  ON groups(note_id)`,
          `CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_blocks_note  ON blocks(note_id, created_at)`
        ];
        for (const sql of stmts) {
          await this.env.DB.prepare(sql).run().catch(() => {
          });
        }
        const alters = [
          `ALTER TABLE notes  ADD COLUMN item_order  TEXT`,
          `ALTER TABLE blocks ADD COLUMN group_id    TEXT`,
          `ALTER TABLE blocks ADD COLUMN group_order INTEGER`
        ];
        for (const sql of alters) {
          await this.env.DB.prepare(sql).run().catch(() => {
          });
        }
      })().catch((e) => {
        this._dbReady = null;
        throw e;
      });
    }
    await this._dbReady;
  }
  async _handleSync(msg, roomId) {
    if (!this.env.DB) return { ok: false, error: "DB not configured" };
    try {
      await this._ensureDb();
      const now = (/* @__PURE__ */ new Date()).toISOString();
      const { action, payload } = msg;
      const noteUpdatedAt = payload.noteUpdatedAt || payload.updatedAt || now;
      if (action === "note_upsert") {
        payload.updatedAt = payload.updatedAt || now;
        const itemOrderJson = payload.itemOrder ? JSON.stringify(payload.itemOrder) : null;
        await this.env.DB.prepare(
          `INSERT INTO notes (id, room_id, title, pinned, updated_at, item_order)
           VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
           ON CONFLICT(id) DO UPDATE SET
             title      = excluded.title,
             pinned     = excluded.pinned,
             updated_at = excluded.updated_at,
             item_order = excluded.item_order
           WHERE excluded.updated_at >= notes.updated_at`
        ).bind(
          payload.id,
          roomId,
          payload.title || "",
          payload.pinned ? 1 : 0,
          payload.updatedAt,
          itemOrderJson
        ).run();
        if (payload.groups && Array.isArray(payload.groups)) {
          const incomingIds = payload.groups.map((g) => g.id);
          for (const g of payload.groups) {
            await this.env.DB.prepare(
              `INSERT INTO groups (id, note_id, room_id, title, created_at)
               VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
               ON CONFLICT(id) DO UPDATE SET
                 title = excluded.title`
            ).bind(g.id, payload.id, roomId, g.title || "\u30B0\u30EB\u30FC\u30D7", now).run();
          }
          if (incomingIds.length > 0) {
            const placeholders = incomingIds.map(() => "?").join(",");
            await this.env.DB.prepare(
              `DELETE FROM groups WHERE note_id=? AND room_id=? AND id NOT IN (${placeholders})`
            ).bind(payload.id, roomId, ...incomingIds).run();
          } else {
            await this.env.DB.prepare(
              `DELETE FROM groups WHERE note_id=? AND room_id=?`
            ).bind(payload.id, roomId).run();
          }
        }
        if (payload.blocks && Array.isArray(payload.blocks)) {
          for (const b of payload.blocks) {
            await this.env.DB.prepare(
              `INSERT INTO blocks (id, note_id, room_id, text, pinned, created_at, updated_at, group_id, group_order)
               VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
               ON CONFLICT(id) DO UPDATE SET
                 group_id    = excluded.group_id,
                 group_order = excluded.group_order`
            ).bind(
              b.id,
              payload.id,
              roomId,
              b.text || "",
              b.pinned ? 1 : 0,
              b.createdAt || now,
              b.updatedAt || now,
              b.groupId || null,
              b.groupOrder ?? null
            ).run();
          }
        }
      }
      if (action === "note_delete") {
        await this.env.DB.prepare(
          `DELETE FROM notes WHERE id=? AND room_id=?`
        ).bind(payload.id, roomId).run();
        await this.env.DB.prepare(
          `DELETE FROM blocks WHERE note_id=? AND room_id=?`
        ).bind(payload.id, roomId).run();
        await this.env.DB.prepare(
          `DELETE FROM groups WHERE note_id=? AND room_id=?`
        ).bind(payload.id, roomId).run();
      }
      if (action === "block_upsert") {
        payload.createdAt = payload.createdAt || now;
        payload.updatedAt = payload.updatedAt || now;
        payload.noteUpdatedAt = noteUpdatedAt;
        await this.env.DB.prepare(
          `INSERT INTO blocks (id, note_id, room_id, text, pinned, created_at, updated_at, group_id, group_order)
           VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
           ON CONFLICT(id) DO UPDATE SET
             text        = excluded.text,
             pinned      = excluded.pinned,
             updated_at  = excluded.updated_at,
             group_id    = excluded.group_id,
             group_order = excluded.group_order
           WHERE excluded.updated_at >= blocks.updated_at`
        ).bind(
          payload.id,
          payload.noteId,
          roomId,
          payload.text || "",
          payload.pinned ? 1 : 0,
          payload.createdAt,
          // INSERT時のみ使用（UPDATEでは上書きしない）
          payload.updatedAt,
          payload.groupId || null,
          payload.groupOrder ?? null
        ).run();
        await this.env.DB.prepare(
          `UPDATE notes SET updated_at=? WHERE id=? AND room_id=? AND updated_at <= ?`
        ).bind(payload.noteUpdatedAt, payload.noteId, roomId, payload.noteUpdatedAt).run();
      }
      if (action === "block_delete") {
        payload.noteUpdatedAt = noteUpdatedAt;
        await this.env.DB.prepare(
          `DELETE FROM blocks WHERE id=? AND room_id=?`
        ).bind(payload.id, roomId).run();
        await this.env.DB.prepare(
          `UPDATE notes SET updated_at=? WHERE id=? AND room_id=? AND updated_at <= ?`
        ).bind(payload.noteUpdatedAt, payload.noteId, roomId, payload.noteUpdatedAt).run();
      }
      if (action === "alias_upsert") {
        if (!payload.key) return { ok: false, error: "alias key required" };
        await this.env.DB.prepare(
          `INSERT INTO aliases (room_id, key, text) VALUES (?, ?, ?)
           ON CONFLICT(room_id, key) DO UPDATE SET text = excluded.text`
        ).bind(roomId, payload.key, payload.text || "").run();
      }
      if (action === "alias_delete") {
        if (!payload.key) return { ok: false, error: "alias key required" };
        await this.env.DB.prepare(
          `DELETE FROM aliases WHERE room_id=? AND key=?`
        ).bind(roomId, payload.key).run();
      }
      msg.serverAckAt = (/* @__PURE__ */ new Date()).toISOString();
      return { ok: true };
    } catch (e) {
      console.warn("DB sync error", e);
      return { ok: false, error: e && e.message ? e.message : "DB sync error" };
    }
  }
};

// server/src/index.js
var INIT_SQL = `
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notes (
  id         TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  room_id    TEXT NOT NULL,
  title      TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  pinned     INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  updated_at TEXT NOT NULL,
  item_order TEXT
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS groups (
  id         TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  note_id    TEXT NOT NULL,
  room_id    TEXT NOT NULL,
  title      TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '\u30B0\u30EB\u30FC\u30D7',
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS blocks (
  id          TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  note_id     TEXT NOT NULL,
  room_id     TEXT NOT NULL,
  text        TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  pinned      INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  created_at  TEXT NOT NULL,
  updated_at  TEXT NOT NULL,
  group_id    TEXT,
  group_order INTEGER
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS aliases (
  room_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  key     TEXT NOT NULL,
  text    TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  PRIMARY KEY (room_id, key)
);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_notes_room   ON notes(room_id, updated_at);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_groups_note  ON groups(note_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_blocks_note  ON blocks(note_id, created_at);
`;
var _dbInitMap = /* @__PURE__ */ new WeakMap();
async function ensureDb(env) {
  if (!env.DB) return;
  if (!_dbInitMap.has(env)) {
    const promise = env.DB.exec(INIT_SQL).catch((e) => {
      _dbInitMap.delete(env);
      throw e;
    });
    _dbInitMap.set(env, promise);
  }
  await _dbInitMap.get(env);
}
__name(ensureDb, "ensureDb");
var index_default = {
  async fetch(request, env) {
    const url = new URL(request.url);
    const parts = url.pathname.split("/").filter(Boolean);
    if (request.method === "OPTIONS") return cors(new Response(null, { status: 204 }), env);
    if (url.pathname === "/ping") return cors(new Response("pong"), env);
    const isWsUpgrade = parts[0] === "ws" && parts[1] && request.headers.get("Upgrade") === "websocket";
    if (!isWsUpgrade) {
      const authErr = checkAuth(request, env);
      if (authErr) return cors(authErr, env);
    }
    try {
      await ensureDb(env);
    } catch (e) {
      console.error("DB initialization failed:", e);
    }
    if (isWsUpgrade) {
      const id = env.NOTE_ROOM.idFromName(parts[1]);
      const headers = new Headers(request.headers);
      headers.set("X-Api-Key-Expected", env.API_KEY || "");
      const newReq = new Request(request.url, { headers, cf: request.cf });
      const doResp = await env.NOTE_ROOM.get(id).fetch(newReq);
      if (doResp.status === 101) return doResp;
      return cors(doResp, env);
    }
    if (request.method === "GET" && parts[0] === "notes" && parts[1]) {
      return cors(await handleLoad(env, parts[1]), env);
    }
    return cors(new Response("not found", { status: 404 }), env);
  }
};
async function handleLoad(env, roomId) {
  if (!env.DB) return jsonResp({ error: "DB not configured" }, 500);
  const [notesRes, blocksRes, groupsRes, aliasesRes] = await Promise.all([
    env.DB.prepare(
      `SELECT * FROM notes WHERE room_id=? ORDER BY pinned DESC, updated_at DESC`
    ).bind(roomId).all(),
    env.DB.prepare(
      `SELECT * FROM blocks WHERE room_id=? ORDER BY note_id, created_at DESC`
    ).bind(roomId).all(),
    env.DB.prepare(
      `SELECT * FROM groups WHERE room_id=?`
    ).bind(roomId).all(),
    env.DB.prepare(
      `SELECT key, text FROM aliases WHERE room_id=? ORDER BY key`
    ).bind(roomId).all()
  ]);
  const blocksByNote = {};
  for (const b of blocksRes.results || []) {
    if (!blocksByNote[b.note_id]) blocksByNote[b.note_id] = [];
    blocksByNote[b.note_id].push({
      id: b.id,
      noteId: b.note_id,
      text: b.text,
      pinned: b.pinned === 1,
      createdAt: b.created_at,
      updatedAt: b.updated_at,
      groupId: b.group_id || null,
      groupOrder: b.group_order ?? null
    });
  }
  const groupsByNote = {};
  for (const g of groupsRes.results || []) {
    if (!groupsByNote[g.note_id]) groupsByNote[g.note_id] = [];
    groupsByNote[g.note_id].push({ id: g.id, title: g.title });
  }
  const notes = (notesRes.results || []).map((n) => {
    let itemOrder = [];
    if (n.item_order) {
      try {
        itemOrder = JSON.parse(n.item_order);
      } catch {
      }
    }
    return {
      id: n.id,
      title: n.title,
      pinned: n.pinned === 1,
      updatedAt: n.updated_at,
      itemOrder,
      blocks: blocksByNote[n.id] || [],
      groups: groupsByNote[n.id] || []
    };
  });
  const aliases = (aliasesRes.results || []).map((a) => ({ key: a.key, text: a.text }));
  return jsonResp({ notes, aliases });
}
__name(handleLoad, "handleLoad");
function checkAuth(request, env) {
  if (!env.API_KEY) {
    console.error("API_KEY is not configured.");
    return jsonResp({ error: "server misconfigured" }, 500);
  }
  const key = request.headers.get("X-Api-Key");
  if (key !== env.API_KEY) return jsonResp({ error: "unauthorized" }, 401);
  return null;
}
__name(checkAuth, "checkAuth");
function jsonResp(data, status = 200) {
  return new Response(JSON.stringify(data), {
    status,
    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" }
  });
}
__name(jsonResp, "jsonResp");
function cors(res, env) {
  const origin = env && env.ALLOWED_ORIGIN ? env.ALLOWED_ORIGIN : "*";
  const h = new Headers(res.headers);
  h.set("Access-Control-Allow-Origin", origin);
  h.set("Access-Control-Allow-Headers", "Content-Type, X-Api-Key");
  h.set("Access-Control-Allow-Methods", "GET, POST, DELETE, OPTIONS");
  return new Response(res.body, { status: res.status, headers: h });
}
__name(cors, "cors");
export {
  NoteRoom,
  index_default as default
};
//# sourceMappingURL=index.js.map
</file>

<file path="client/app.js">
// ===== utils =====
function uid() {
    if (typeof crypto !== 'undefined' && crypto.randomUUID) return crypto.randomUUID();
    return Date.now().toString(36) + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 12);
}

function fmtShort(iso) {
    try {
        const d = new Date(iso), now = new Date();
        const hh = String(d.getHours()).padStart(2, '0'), mi = String(d.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');
        if (d.toDateString() === now.toDateString()) return hh + ':' + mi;
        return String(d.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0') + '/' + String(d.getDate()).padStart(2, '0') + ' ' + hh + ':' + mi;
    } catch { return ''; }
}

function fmtFull(iso) {
    try {
        const d = new Date(iso);
        return d.getFullYear() + '/' +
            String(d.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0') + '/' +
            String(d.getDate()).padStart(2, '0') + ' ' +
            String(d.getHours()).padStart(2, '0') + ':' +
            String(d.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');
    } catch { return ''; }
}

function fmtDateTime(iso) { return fmtFull(iso); }

function esc(s) {
    return (s || '').replace(/&/g, '&amp;').replace(/</g, '&lt;').replace(/>/g, '&gt;');
}

function newerIso(a, b) {
    return new Date(a || 0).getTime() >= new Date(b || 0).getTime();
}

function mergeBlocks(existingBlocks = [], incomingBlocks = []) {
    const byId = new Map(existingBlocks.map(b => [b.id, b]));
    for (const incoming of incomingBlocks) {
        const current = byId.get(incoming.id);
        if (!current) { byId.set(incoming.id, incoming); continue; }
        const next = { ...current };
        if (newerIso(incoming.updatedAt, current.updatedAt)) Object.assign(next, incoming);
        else {
            if ('groupId' in incoming) next.groupId = incoming.groupId;
            if ('groupOrder' in incoming) next.groupOrder = incoming.groupOrder;
        }
        byId.set(incoming.id, next);
    }
    return Array.from(byId.values());
}

// ===== Store =====
const Store = {
    get: k => { try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(k)); } catch { return null; } },
    set: (k, v) => localStorage.setItem(k, JSON.stringify(v)),
    remove: k => localStorage.removeItem(k)
};

// ===== State =====
let state = {
    notes: [],
    currentNoteId: null,
    settings: Store.get('cn_settings') || { url: '', key: '', room: '' },
    ui: { blockFont: 13.5, groupFont: 22 },
    sortMode: false,
    clientId: uid(),
    syncSeq: 0
};

// ===== Apply UI settings =====
function applyUiSettings() {
    const root = document.documentElement;
    root.style.setProperty('--block-font-size', state.ui.blockFont + 'px');
    root.style.setProperty('--group-font-size', state.ui.groupFont + 'px');
}

// ===== Alias =====
// キー形式: 大文字アルファベット + 数字 (例: H1, P2, IMG3)
// 注意: ALIAS_RE はグローバルフラグ付きのため、必ず使用前に lastIndex をリセットすること
const ALIAS_RE = /\b([A-Z]+[0-9]+)\b/g;

const AliasStore = {
    load() { return Store.get('cn_aliases') || []; },
    save(list) { Store.set('cn_aliases', list); }
};

// aliases: [{ key: 'H1', text: '笑顔にして' }, ...]
// サーバーから取得したエイリアスで初期化（ローカルキャッシュはフォールバック用）
let aliases = AliasStore.load();

function aliasMap() {
    const m = new Map();
    for (const a of aliases) m.set(a.key, a.text);
    return m;
}

// プレーンテキストへの展開（コピー用）
function expandAliases(text) {
    const m = aliasMap();
    // グローバル RegExp の lastIndex 汚染を防ぐため新しいインスタンスを使用
    const re = new RegExp(ALIAS_RE.source, 'g');
    return text.replace(re, (match) => m.has(match) ? m.get(match) : match);
}

// HTML表示用: エイリアス部分を色付きバッジに変換
function renderAliasedHTML(text) {
    const m = aliasMap();
    const re = new RegExp(ALIAS_RE.source, 'g'); // 毎回新規作成で lastIndex 汚染を回避
    const parts = [];
    let last = 0;
    let match;
    while ((match = re.exec(text)) !== null) {
        if (match.index > last) parts.push(esc(text.slice(last, match.index)));
        const key = match[1];
        if (m.has(key)) {
            parts.push('<span class="alias-badge alias-badge--defined" title="' + esc(key) + '">' + esc(m.get(key)) + '</span>');
        } else {
            parts.push('<span class="alias-badge alias-badge--undefined" title="未定義のエイリアス">' + esc(key) + '</span>');
        }
        last = match.index + match[0].length;
    }
    if (last < text.length) parts.push(esc(text.slice(last)));
    return parts.join('');
}

// ===== WebSocket =====
const WS = (() => {
    let ws = null, pingT = null, reconnT = null, watchdogT = null, closed = false, authed = false;
    let authFailed = false;
    let lastPongAt = 0;
    const PING_INTERVAL = 20000;
    const PONG_TIMEOUT = 10000;
    const pending = new Map();

    function _clearTimers() {
        clearInterval(pingT); clearInterval(watchdogT); clearTimeout(reconnT);
        pingT = watchdogT = reconnT = null;
    }

    function _forceReconnect() {
        if (closed) return;
        console.warn('[WS] pong timeout — force reconnect');
        authed = false; _clearTimers();
        if (ws) { try { ws.close(); } catch { } ws = null; }
        setStatus('offline');
        reconnT = setTimeout(connect, 500);
    }

    function connect() {
        if (closed) return;
        const { url, key, room } = state.settings;
        if (!url || !room) return;
        authFailed = false;
        try {
            ws = new WebSocket(url.replace(/^http/, 'ws') + '/ws/' + encodeURIComponent(room));
        } catch { return; }

        ws.onopen = () => {
            ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'auth', key }));
            authed = false; setStatus('syncing');
        };
        ws.onmessage = e => {
            try {
                const m = JSON.parse(e.data);
                if (m.type === 'pong') { lastPongAt = Date.now(); return; }
                if (m.type === 'auth_ok') {
                    authed = true; lastPongAt = Date.now();
                    setStatus(pending.size ? 'syncing' : 'online');
                    flushPending();
                    if (pending.size === 0) loadFromServer();
                    _clearTimers();
                    pingT = setInterval(() => {
                        if (ws && ws.readyState === 1 && authed) ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'ping' }));
                    }, PING_INTERVAL);
                    watchdogT = setInterval(() => {
                        if (Date.now() - lastPongAt > PING_INTERVAL + PONG_TIMEOUT) _forceReconnect();
                    }, PING_INTERVAL + PONG_TIMEOUT);
                    return;
                }
                if (m.type === 'auth_error') {
                    authFailed = true;
                    setStatus('error');
                    showToast('APIキーが正しくありません', 3500);
                    try { ws.close(); } catch { }
                    return;
                }
                if (m.type === 'sync_error') { setStatus('error'); console.warn('sync error', m); return; }
                if (m.type === 'sync') {
                    if (m.clientId === state.clientId && m.clientMsgId) {
                        pending.delete(m.clientMsgId);
                        setStatus(pending.size ? 'syncing' : 'online');
                    }
                    applySync(m, true);
                }
            } catch { }
        };
        ws.onclose = () => {
            authed = false; _clearTimers();
            if (authFailed) { setStatus('error'); return; }
            setStatus('offline');
            if (!closed) reconnT = setTimeout(connect, 1500);
        };
        ws.onerror = () => setStatus('error');
    }

    document.addEventListener('visibilitychange', () => {
        if (document.visibilityState === 'visible' && !closed) {
            const alive = ws && ws.readyState === 1 && authed
                && Date.now() - lastPongAt < PING_INTERVAL + PONG_TIMEOUT;
            if (!alive) { console.log('[WS] visibility restored — reconnecting'); _forceReconnect(); }
        }
    });

    function prepare(m) {
        if (m.type !== 'sync') return m;
        if (!m.clientId) m.clientId = state.clientId;
        if (!m.clientMsgId) m.clientMsgId = uid();
        if (!m.clientSeq) m.clientSeq = ++state.syncSeq;
        pending.set(m.clientMsgId, m);
        setStatus('syncing');
        return m;
    }

    function transmit(m) {
        try {
            if (ws && ws.readyState === 1 && authed) ws.send(JSON.stringify(m));
        } catch { setStatus('error'); }
    }

    function flushPending() {
        if (!authed) return;
        pending.forEach(m => transmit(m));
    }

    function send(m) {
        m = prepare(m);
        if (m.type !== 'sync') { transmit(m); return; }
        if (authed) transmit(m);
    }

    function disconnect() { closed = true; authed = false; _clearTimers(); if (ws) ws.close(); }
    function reset() { closed = false; disconnect(); closed = false; setTimeout(connect, 300); }
    function ensureConnected() {
        if (closed) return;
        const alive = ws && ws.readyState === 1 && authed
            && Date.now() - lastPongAt < PING_INTERVAL + PONG_TIMEOUT;
        if (!alive) _forceReconnect();
    }

    function hasAuthFailed() { return authFailed; }

    return { connect, send, disconnect, reset, ensureConnected, hasAuthFailed };
})();

function setStatus(s) {
    const d = document.getElementById('statusDot');
    d.className = 'sidebar-status ' + (s === 'online' ? 'online' : s === 'error' ? 'error' : s === 'syncing' ? 'syncing' : '');
    d.title = s === 'online' ? '接続中' : s === 'syncing' ? '同期中' : s === 'error' ? 'エラー' : '未接続';
}

function applySync(msg, fromRemote) {
    const { action, payload } = msg;
    if (action === 'note_upsert') {
        const idx = state.notes.findIndex(n => n.id === payload.id);
        if (idx >= 0) {
            const existing = state.notes[idx];
            if (!newerIso(payload.updatedAt, existing.updatedAt)) {
                if (fromRemote) {
                    const merged = { ...existing };
                    if (payload.blocks) merged.blocks = mergeBlocks(existing.blocks, payload.blocks);
                    state.notes[idx] = merged;
                }
            } else {
                const merged = { ...payload };
                if (payload.blocks && existing.blocks) merged.blocks = mergeBlocks(existing.blocks, payload.blocks);
                state.notes[idx] = merged;
            }
        } else {
            state.notes.push(payload);
        }
        sortNotes(); renderNoteList();
        if (state.currentNoteId === payload.id) {
            renderHeader();
            if (!getActiveEditingBlockId()) renderBlocks();
        }
    } else if (action === 'note_delete') {
        state.notes = state.notes.filter(n => n.id !== payload.id);
        if (state.currentNoteId === payload.id) {
            state.currentNoteId = state.notes[0]?.id || null;
            renderAll();
        } else { renderNoteList(); }
    } else if (action === 'block_upsert') {
        const note = state.notes.find(n => n.id === payload.noteId);
        if (!note) return;
        const idx = note.blocks.findIndex(b => b.id === payload.id);
        if (idx >= 0) {
            const cur = note.blocks[idx];
            if (newerIso(payload.updatedAt, cur.updatedAt)) note.blocks[idx] = { ...cur, ...payload };
            else if ('groupId' in payload) note.blocks[idx] = { ...cur, groupId: payload.groupId, groupOrder: payload.groupOrder };
        } else { note.blocks.push(payload); }
        if (newerIso(payload.noteUpdatedAt, note.updatedAt)) note.updatedAt = payload.noteUpdatedAt;
        if (state.currentNoteId === payload.noteId) {
            renderHeader();
            const editingId = getActiveEditingBlockId();
            syncActiveTextarea(note.blocks.find(b => b.id === payload.id), editingId === payload.id);
            if (editingId !== payload.id) renderBlocks();
        }
        renderNoteList();
    } else if (action === 'block_delete') {
        const note = state.notes.find(n => n.id === payload.noteId);
        if (!note) return;
        note.blocks = note.blocks.filter(b => b.id !== payload.id);
        if (newerIso(payload.noteUpdatedAt, note.updatedAt)) note.updatedAt = payload.noteUpdatedAt;
        if (state.currentNoteId === payload.noteId) { renderHeader(); renderBlocks(); }
        renderNoteList();
    } else if (action === 'alias_upsert') {
        // リモートからのエイリアス追加・更新を反映
        const idx = aliases.findIndex(a => a.key === payload.key);
        if (idx >= 0) aliases[idx].text = payload.text;
        else aliases.push({ key: payload.key, text: payload.text });
        aliases.sort((a, b) => a.key.localeCompare(b.key, undefined, { numeric: true }));
        AliasStore.save(aliases);
        renderAliasTable();
        renderBlocks();
    } else if (action === 'alias_delete') {
        // リモートからのエイリアス削除を反映
        aliases = aliases.filter(a => a.key !== payload.key);
        AliasStore.save(aliases);
        renderAliasTable();
        renderBlocks();
    }
}

function dispatch(action, payload) {
    if (WS.hasAuthFailed()) {
        setStatus('error');
        showToast('APIキーが正しくありません', 3500);
        return false;
    }
    const now = new Date().toISOString();
    if (action === 'note_upsert') {
        payload.updatedAt = payload.updatedAt || now;
        applySync({ action, payload }, false);
        WS.send({ type: 'sync', action, payload });
    } else if (action === 'note_delete') {
        applySync({ action, payload }, false);
        WS.send({ type: 'sync', action, payload });
    } else if (action === 'block_upsert') {
        payload.createdAt = payload.createdAt || now;
        payload.updatedAt = now;
        payload.noteUpdatedAt = now;
        applySync({ action, payload }, false);
        WS.send({ type: 'sync', action, payload });
    } else if (action === 'block_delete') {
        payload.noteUpdatedAt = now;
        applySync({ action, payload }, false);
        WS.send({ type: 'sync', action, payload });
    } else if (action === 'alias_upsert') {
        applySync({ action, payload }, false);
        WS.send({ type: 'sync', action, payload });
    } else if (action === 'alias_delete') {
        applySync({ action, payload }, false);
        WS.send({ type: 'sync', action, payload });
    }
    return true;
}

function persist() { }
function loadLocal() { Store.remove('cn_notes'); Store.remove('cn_ui'); }

async function loadFromServer() {
    const { url, key, room } = state.settings; if (!url || !room) return;
    try {
        const r = await fetch(url + '/notes/' + encodeURIComponent(room), { headers: { 'x-api-key': key } });
        if (!r.ok) {
            if (r.status === 401) {
                setStatus('error');
                showToast('APIキーが正しくありません', 3500);
            }
            return;
        }
        const data = await r.json();
        for (const n of (data.notes || [])) applySync({ action: 'note_upsert', payload: n }, true);

        // サーバー側のエイリアスをマージ（サーバーが正）
        if (Array.isArray(data.aliases) && data.aliases.length > 0) {
            const serverMap = new Map(data.aliases.map(a => [a.key, a.text]));
            // ローカルにあってサーバーにないものは保持、サーバーのもので上書き
            const merged = new Map(aliases.map(a => [a.key, a.text]));
            for (const [k, v] of serverMap) merged.set(k, v);
            aliases = Array.from(merged, ([key, text]) => ({ key, text }));
            aliases.sort((a, b) => a.key.localeCompare(b.key, undefined, { numeric: true }));
            AliasStore.save(aliases);
        }

        sortNotes(); renderAll();
        // エイリアスモーダルが開いていれば再描画
        if (!document.getElementById('aliasModal').classList.contains('hidden')) {
            renderAliasTable();
        }
        renderBlocks(); // エイリアス更新で表示を更新
    } catch { }
}

function sortNotes() {
    state.notes.sort((a, b) => {
        if (a.pinned !== b.pinned) return a.pinned ? -1 : 1;
        return new Date(b.updatedAt || 0) - new Date(a.updatedAt || 0);
    });
}

function currentNote() { return state.notes.find(n => n.id === state.currentNoteId) || null; }

function getItemOrder(note) {
    if (note.itemOrder && note.itemOrder.length > 0) return note.itemOrder;
    const pinned = (note.blocks || []).filter(b => b.pinned && !b.groupId).map(b => ({ type: 'block', id: b.id }));
    const groups = (note.groups || []).map(g => ({ type: 'group', id: g.id }));
    const ungrouped = (note.blocks || []).filter(b => !b.pinned && !b.groupId).map(b => ({ type: 'block', id: b.id }));
    return [...pinned, ...groups, ...ungrouped];
}

function getGroupBlocks(note, groupId) {
    return (note.blocks || [])
        .filter(b => b.groupId === groupId)
        .sort((a, b) => (a.groupOrder ?? 0) - (b.groupOrder ?? 0));
}

function renderNoteList() {
    const q = (document.getElementById('searchInput').value || '').toLowerCase();
    const el = document.getElementById('noteList');
    el.innerHTML = '';
    for (const n of state.notes) {
        const title = n.title || '無題のメモ';
        if (q && !title.toLowerCase().includes(q) && !(n.blocks || []).some(b => b.text.toLowerCase().includes(q))) continue;
        const d = document.createElement('div');
        d.className = 'note-item' + (n.id === state.currentNoteId ? ' active' : '') + (n.pinned ? ' pinned' : '');
        d.innerHTML = '<div class="note-item-title">' + (n.pinned ? '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" width="11" height="11"><path d="M12 17v5M9 3h6l1 7H8L9 3zM8 10l-2 7h12l-2-7"/></svg>' : '') + esc(title) + '</div>' +
            '<div class="note-item-meta">' + fmtShort(n.updatedAt) + ' · ' + (n.blocks || []).length + 'ブロック</div>';
        d.addEventListener('click', () => { state.currentNoteId = n.id; renderAll(); App.hideSidebar(); });
        el.appendChild(d);
    }
}

function renderHeader() {
    const n = currentNote();
    const titleInput = document.getElementById('noteTitleInput');
    const updated = document.getElementById('noteUpdated');
    const addBar = document.getElementById('addBar');
    const pinBtn = document.getElementById('notePinBtn');
    if (!n) {
        titleInput.value = ''; titleInput.disabled = true;
        updated.textContent = ''; addBar.style.display = 'none';
        pinBtn.classList.remove('active'); return;
    }
    titleInput.disabled = false;
    if (document.activeElement !== titleInput) titleInput.value = n.title || '';
    updated.textContent = fmtDateTime(n.updatedAt);
    addBar.style.display = 'flex';
    pinBtn.classList.toggle('active', !!n.pinned);
}

function renderBlocks() {
    const note = currentNote();
    const area = document.getElementById('blocksArea');
    if (!note) {
        area.innerHTML = '<div class="empty-state"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8z"/><polyline points="14 2 14 8 20 8"/></svg>メモを選択するか、新しく作成してください</div>';
        return;
    }
    if (state.sortMode) { initSortDrag(area, note); return; }
    area.innerHTML = '';
    const order = getItemOrder(note);
    for (const item of order) {
        if (item.type === 'block') {
            const b = (note.blocks || []).find(bl => bl.id === item.id);
            if (b) area.appendChild(makeBlockEl(b, note));
        } else if (item.type === 'group') {
            const g = (note.groups || []).find(gr => gr.id === item.id);
            if (g) {
                const gblocks = getGroupBlocks(note, g.id);
                area.appendChild(makeGroupEl(g, gblocks, note));
            }
        }
    }
    if (!state.sortMode) initDragDrop(area, note);
}

function makeGroupEl(g, blocks, note) {
    const el = document.createElement('div');
    el.className = 'block-group'; el.dataset.id = g.id; el.dataset.type = 'group';

    const header = document.createElement('div');
    header.className = 'group-header';

    const titleEl = document.createElement('div');
    titleEl.className = 'group-title';
    titleEl.textContent = g.title || 'グループ';
    titleEl.contentEditable = 'false';

    function saveTitle() {
        const newTitle = titleEl.textContent.trim() || 'グループ';
        titleEl.contentEditable = 'false';
        const n = currentNote(); if (!n) return;
        const updated = { ...n, groups: n.groups.map(gr => gr.id === g.id ? { ...gr, title: newTitle } : gr), updatedAt: new Date().toISOString() };
        state.notes = state.notes.map(no => no.id === n.id ? updated : no);
        persist(); renderHeader(); renderNoteList(); WS.send({ type: 'sync', action: 'note_upsert', payload: updated });
    }

    titleEl.addEventListener('dblclick', () => {
        titleEl.contentEditable = 'true'; titleEl.focus();
        const range = document.createRange(); range.selectNodeContents(titleEl);
        window.getSelection().removeAllRanges(); window.getSelection().addRange(range);
    });
    titleEl.addEventListener('blur', saveTitle);
    titleEl.addEventListener('keydown', e => { if (e.key === 'Enter') { e.preventDefault(); titleEl.blur(); } });

    const delBtn = document.createElement('button');
    delBtn.className = 'group-del-btn'; delBtn.title = 'グループを解除';
    delBtn.innerHTML = '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M18 6L6 18M6 6l12 12"/></svg>';
    delBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
        const n = currentNote(); if (!n) return;
        const newBlocks = n.blocks.map(b => b.groupId === g.id ? { ...b, groupId: null, groupOrder: null } : b);
        const newGroups = (n.groups || []).filter(gr => gr.id !== g.id);
        const newOrder = getItemOrder(n)
            .filter(it => !(it.type === 'group' && it.id === g.id))
            .concat(blocks.map(b => ({ type: 'block', id: b.id })));
        const updated = { ...n, blocks: newBlocks, groups: newGroups, itemOrder: newOrder, updatedAt: new Date().toISOString() };
        state.notes = state.notes.map(no => no.id === n.id ? updated : no);
        persist(); renderHeader(); renderBlocks(); renderNoteList(); WS.send({ type: 'sync', action: 'note_upsert', payload: updated });
    });

    header.appendChild(titleEl); header.appendChild(delBtn); el.appendChild(header);

    const inner = document.createElement('div');
    inner.className = 'group-inner'; inner.dataset.groupId = g.id;

    for (const b of blocks) inner.appendChild(makeBlockEl(b, note));

    const addRow = document.createElement('div');
    addRow.className = 'group-add-row';
    const ta = document.createElement('textarea');
    ta.className = 'group-add-ta'; ta.rows = 1; ta.placeholder = 'グループに追加...';
    ta.addEventListener('input', function () {
        this.style.height = '32px'; this.style.height = Math.min(this.scrollHeight, 100) + 'px';
    });

    function doAdd() {
        const text = ta.value.trim(); if (!text) return;
        const n = currentNote(); if (!n) return;
        const now = new Date().toISOString();
        const maxOrder = Math.max(0, ...blocks.map(b => b.groupOrder ?? 0));
        const block = { id: uid(), noteId: n.id, text, pinned: false, createdAt: now, groupId: g.id, groupOrder: maxOrder + 1 };
        const { blocks: _, ...noteWithoutBlocks } = { ...n, updatedAt: now };
        dispatch('block_upsert', block);
        dispatch('note_upsert', noteWithoutBlocks);
        ta.value = ''; ta.style.height = '32px';
    }
    ta.addEventListener('keydown', e => { if (e.key === 'Enter' && !e.shiftKey) { e.preventDefault(); doAdd(); } });
    const addBtn = document.createElement('button');
    addBtn.className = 'group-add-btn';
    addBtn.innerHTML = '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M12 5v14M5 12h14"/></svg>';
    addBtn.addEventListener('click', doAdd);
    addRow.appendChild(ta); addRow.appendChild(addBtn);
    inner.appendChild(addRow); el.appendChild(inner);
    if (!state.sortMode) initDragDrop(inner, note);
    return el;
}

function makeBlockEl(b, note) {
    const card = document.createElement('div');
    card.className = 'block-card' + (b.pinned ? ' pinned' : '');
    card.dataset.id = b.id; card.dataset.type = 'block'; card.draggable = false;

    const groups = note.groups || [];
    const pinCls = 'block-act' + (b.pinned ? ' pin-on' : '');
    const pinLbl = b.pinned ? 'ピン留めを外す' : 'ピン留め';
    const grpCls = 'block-act' + (b.groupId ? ' grp-on' : '');
    const pickerItems = groups.map(g =>
        '<div class="grp-picker-item' + (b.groupId === g.id ? ' cur' : '') + '" data-gid="' + g.id + '">' + esc(g.title || 'グループ') + '</div>'
    ).join('');

    const displayHTML = renderAliasedHTML(b.text);

    card.innerHTML =
        '<div class="sort-handle" title="ドラッグで並び替え">' +
        '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><line x1="3" y1="8" x2="21" y2="8"/><line x1="3" y1="16" x2="21" y2="16"/></svg>' +
        '</div>' +
        '<div class="block-header">' +
        '<div class="block-time">' +
        '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><polyline points="12 6 12 12 16 14"/></svg>' +
        fmtDateTime(b.createdAt) +
        '</div>' +
        '<div class="block-actions">' +
        '<button class="' + grpCls + ' grp-btn" title="グループ">' +
        '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="2" y="3" width="8" height="8" rx="1"/><rect x="14" y="3" width="8" height="8" rx="1"/><rect x="2" y="13" width="8" height="8" rx="1"/><rect x="14" y="13" width="8" height="8" rx="1"/></svg>' +
        '</button>' +
        '<div class="grp-picker" id="gp-' + b.id + '">' +
        pickerItems +
        (groups.length ? '<div class="grp-picker-sep"></div>' : '') +
        '<div class="grp-picker-new" data-new="1"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M12 5v14M5 12h14"/></svg>新しいグループ</div>' +
        '</div>' +
        '<button class="' + pinCls + ' pin-btn" title="' + pinLbl + '">' +
        '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M12 17v5M9 3h6l1 7H8L9 3zM8 10l-2 7h12l-2-7"/></svg>' +
        '</button>' +
        '<button class="block-act edit-btn" title="編集">' +
        '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M11 4H4a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v14a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h14a2 2 0 0 0 2-2v-7"/><path d="M18.5 2.5a2.121 2.121 0 0 1 3 3L12 15l-4 1 1-4 9.5-9.5z"/></svg>' +
        '</button>' +
        '<button class="block-act del-btn" title="削除">' +
        '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><polyline points="3 6 5 6 21 6"/><path d="M19 6l-1 14H6L5 6"/><path d="M10 11v6M14 11v6"/><path d="M9 6V4h6v2"/></svg>' +
        '</button>' +
        '</div>' +
        '</div>' +
        '<div class="block-text-wrap"><div class="block-text">' + displayHTML + '</div></div>' +
        '<div class="block-edit-wrap">' +
        '<textarea class="block-edit-ta"></textarea>' +
        '<div class="block-edit-actions"><button class="edit-cancel-btn">キャンセル</button><button class="edit-save-btn">保存</button></div>' +
        '</div>' +
        '<div class="copy-badge" id="cb-' + b.id + '">コピーしました</div>';

    card.querySelector('.block-text').addEventListener('click', () => { if (!state.sortMode) copyBlock(b, card); });

    card.querySelector('.pin-btn').addEventListener('click', e => {
        e.stopPropagation();
        dispatch('block_upsert', { ...b, noteId: note.id, pinned: !b.pinned });
    });

    const grpBtn = card.querySelector('.grp-btn');
    const picker = card.querySelector('#gp-' + b.id);
    grpBtn.addEventListener('click', e => {
        e.stopPropagation();
        document.querySelectorAll('.grp-picker.open').forEach(p => { if (p !== picker) p.classList.remove('open'); });
        picker.classList.toggle('open');
    });
    picker.addEventListener('click', e => {
        e.stopPropagation();
        const item = e.target.closest('[data-gid]');
        const isNew = e.target.closest('[data-new]');
        const n = currentNote(); if (!n) return;

        if (isNew) {
            const title = prompt('グループ名を入力してください', '新しいグループ');
            if (!title) return;
            const gid = uid();
            const curOrder = getItemOrder(n);
            const blockIdx = curOrder.findIndex(it => it.type === 'block' && it.id === b.id);
            const newOrder = [...curOrder];
            if (blockIdx >= 0) newOrder.splice(blockIdx, 1, { type: 'group', id: gid });
            else newOrder.push({ type: 'group', id: gid });
            const newBlocks = n.blocks.map(bl => bl.id === b.id ? { ...bl, groupId: gid, groupOrder: 0 } : bl);
            const updated = { ...n, blocks: newBlocks, groups: [...(n.groups || []), { id: gid, title }], itemOrder: newOrder, updatedAt: new Date().toISOString() };
            state.notes = state.notes.map(no => no.id === n.id ? updated : no);
            persist(); renderHeader(); renderBlocks(); renderNoteList(); WS.send({ type: 'sync', action: 'note_upsert', payload: updated });
        } else if (item) {
            const gid = item.dataset.gid;
            const newGid = b.groupId === gid ? null : gid;
            let curOrder = getItemOrder(n);
            if (newGid === null) {
                const grpIdx = curOrder.findIndex(it => it.type === 'group' && it.id === b.groupId);
                curOrder = curOrder.filter(it => !(it.type === 'block' && it.id === b.id));
                if (grpIdx >= 0) curOrder.splice(grpIdx, 0, { type: 'block', id: b.id });
                else curOrder.push({ type: 'block', id: b.id });
            } else {
                curOrder = curOrder.filter(it => !(it.type === 'block' && it.id === b.id));
            }
            const newBlocks = n.blocks.map(bl => bl.id === b.id ? { ...bl, groupId: newGid, groupOrder: newGid ? Date.now() : bl.groupOrder } : bl);
            const updated = { ...n, blocks: newBlocks, itemOrder: curOrder, updatedAt: new Date().toISOString() };
            state.notes = state.notes.map(no => no.id === n.id ? updated : no);
            persist(); renderHeader(); renderBlocks(); renderNoteList(); WS.send({ type: 'sync', action: 'note_upsert', payload: updated });
        }
        picker.classList.remove('open');
    });

    const editBtn = card.querySelector('.edit-btn');
    const tw = card.querySelector('.block-text-wrap');
    const ew = card.querySelector('.block-edit-wrap');
    const ta = card.querySelector('.block-edit-ta');
    editBtn.addEventListener('click', e => {
        e.stopPropagation(); ta.value = b.text;
        tw.classList.add('editing'); ew.classList.add('active');
        ta.style.height = Math.max(ta.scrollHeight, 60) + 'px'; ta.focus();
    });
    ta.addEventListener('input', function () {
        this.style.height = 'auto'; this.style.height = this.scrollHeight + 'px';
        dispatch('block_upsert', { ...b, noteId: note.id, text: ta.value });
    });
    card.querySelector('.edit-cancel-btn').addEventListener('click', () => {
        tw.classList.remove('editing'); ew.classList.remove('active'); renderBlocks();
    });
    card.querySelector('.edit-save-btn').addEventListener('click', () => {
        tw.classList.remove('editing'); ew.classList.remove('active'); renderBlocks();
    });
    card.querySelector('.del-btn').addEventListener('click', e => {
        e.stopPropagation();
        if (!confirm('このブロックを削除しますか？')) return;
        dispatch('block_delete', { id: b.id, noteId: note.id });
    });

    return card;
}

document.addEventListener('click', () =>
    document.querySelectorAll('.grp-picker.open').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('open'))
);

// ===== FLIP animation =====
function flipAnimate(area, fn) {
    const rects = new Map();
    area.querySelectorAll(':scope > .block-card, :scope > .block-group').forEach(el => {
        rects.set(el.dataset.id, el.getBoundingClientRect());
    });
    fn();
    area.querySelectorAll(':scope > .block-card, :scope > .block-group').forEach(el => {
        const old = rects.get(el.dataset.id); if (!old) return;
        const now = el.getBoundingClientRect();
        const dy = old.top - now.top;
        if (Math.abs(dy) < 1) return;
        el.style.transform = `translateY(${dy}px)`; el.style.transition = 'none';
        requestAnimationFrame(() => {
            el.style.transition = 'transform .22s ease'; el.style.transform = '';
            el.addEventListener('transitionend', () => { el.style.transition = ''; }, { once: true });
        });
    });
}

function getOrCreateIndicator() {
    let ind = document.getElementById('drop-indicator');
    if (!ind) {
        ind = document.createElement('div'); ind.id = 'drop-indicator'; ind.className = 'drop-indicator';
        document.body.appendChild(ind);
    }
    return ind;
}

function showIndicator(targetEl, before) {
    const ind = getOrCreateIndicator();
    const rect = targetEl.getBoundingClientRect();
    const scrollY = window.scrollY || document.documentElement.scrollTop;
    ind.style.top = (before ? rect.top : rect.bottom) + scrollY - 1.5 + 'px';
    ind.style.left = rect.left + 'px'; ind.style.width = rect.width + 'px'; ind.style.display = 'block';
}

function hideIndicator() {
    const ind = document.getElementById('drop-indicator');
    if (ind) ind.style.display = 'none';
}

function initDragDrop(area, note) {
    let dragId = null, dragType = null, overEl = null, overBefore = false;

    area.querySelectorAll(':scope > .block-card, :scope > .block-group').forEach(el => {
        el.setAttribute('draggable', 'false');
    });

    function onDragStart(e, el) {
        dragId = el.dataset.id; dragType = el.dataset.type;
        el.classList.add('dragging'); e.dataTransfer.effectAllowed = 'move';
    }
    function onDragOver(e, el) {
        if (!dragId || el.dataset.id === dragId) return;
        e.preventDefault();
        const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
        overBefore = e.clientY < rect.top + rect.height / 2;
        overEl = el; showIndicator(el, overBefore);
    }
    function onDrop(e) {
        e.preventDefault(); hideIndicator();
        if (!dragId || !overEl || overEl.dataset.id === dragId) { cleanup(); return; }
        const toId = overEl.dataset.id, toType = overEl.dataset.type;
        flipAnimate(area, () => applyTopLevelReorder(note, dragId, dragType, toId, toType, overBefore));
        cleanup();
    }
    function cleanup() {
        area.querySelectorAll('.dragging').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('dragging'));
        hideIndicator(); dragId = dragType = overEl = null;
    }

    area.querySelectorAll(':scope > .block-card, :scope > .block-group').forEach(el => {
        const handle = el.querySelector('.sort-handle');
        if (handle) {
            handle.addEventListener('mousedown', () => el.setAttribute('draggable', 'true'));
            handle.addEventListener('mouseup', () => el.setAttribute('draggable', 'false'));
        }
        el.addEventListener('dragstart', e => onDragStart(e, el));
        el.addEventListener('dragover', e => onDragOver(e, el));
        el.addEventListener('dragleave', () => { hideIndicator(); overEl = null; });
        el.addEventListener('drop', onDrop);
        el.addEventListener('dragend', cleanup);
    });
}

function applyGroupBlockReorder(note, groupId, fromId, toId, before = false) {
    const blocks = getGroupBlocks(note, groupId);
    const fromIdx = blocks.findIndex(b => b.id === fromId);
    const toIdx = blocks.findIndex(b => b.id === toId);
    if (fromIdx < 0 || toIdx < 0) return;
    const moved = blocks.splice(fromIdx, 1)[0];
    const insertAt = before ? toIdx : toIdx + 1;
    blocks.splice(insertAt > fromIdx ? insertAt - 1 : insertAt, 0, moved);
    const newBlocks = note.blocks.map(b => {
        const idx = blocks.findIndex(bl => bl.id === b.id);
        return idx >= 0 ? { ...b, groupOrder: idx } : b;
    });
    const updated = { ...note, blocks: newBlocks, updatedAt: new Date().toISOString() };
    state.notes = state.notes.map(n => n.id === note.id ? updated : n);
    persist(); renderHeader(); renderBlocks(); renderNoteList(); WS.send({ type: 'sync', action: 'note_upsert', payload: updated });
}

function initSortDrag(area, note) {
    area.innerHTML = '';
    const order = getItemOrder(note);
    for (const item of order) {
        if (item.type === 'block') {
            const b = (note.blocks || []).find(bl => bl.id === item.id);
            if (b) area.appendChild(makeBlockEl(b, note));
        } else if (item.type === 'group') {
            const g = (note.groups || []).find(gr => gr.id === item.id);
            if (g) { const gblocks = getGroupBlocks(note, g.id); area.appendChild(makeGroupEl(g, gblocks, note)); }
        }
    }

    let dragId = null, dragType = null;

    function moveDrag(clientY) {
        if (!dragId) return;
        const items = Array.from(area.querySelectorAll(':scope > .block-card, :scope > .block-group'));
        let target = null, before = false;
        for (const item of items) {
            if (item.dataset.id === dragId) continue;
            const rect = item.getBoundingClientRect();
            if (clientY < rect.bottom) { target = item; before = clientY < rect.top + rect.height / 2; break; }
        }
        if (target) showIndicator(target, before); else hideIndicator();
    }

    function endDrag() {
        if (!dragId) return;
        const ind = document.getElementById('drop-indicator');
        hideIndicator();
        const items = Array.from(area.querySelectorAll(':scope > .block-card, :scope > .block-group'));
        let toId = null, before = false;
        if (ind && ind.style.display !== 'none') {
            const indTop = parseFloat(ind.style.top);
            for (const item of items) {
                if (item.dataset.id === dragId) continue;
                const rect = item.getBoundingClientRect();
                const scrollY = window.scrollY || document.documentElement.scrollTop;
                if (Math.abs(rect.top + scrollY - 1.5 - indTop) < 5) { toId = item.dataset.id; before = true; break; }
                if (Math.abs(rect.bottom + scrollY - 1.5 - indTop) < 5) { toId = item.dataset.id; before = false; break; }
            }
        }
        area.querySelectorAll('.sort-dragging').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('sort-dragging'));
        const savedId = dragId, savedType = dragType;
        dragId = dragType = null;
        if (toId) {
            const toType = area.querySelector('[data-id="' + toId + '"]')?.dataset.type;
            flipAnimate(area, () => applyTopLevelReorder(note, savedId, savedType, toId, toType, before));
        }
    }

    function onMouseStart(e, el, type) {
        if (e.button !== 0) return;
        dragId = el.dataset.id; dragType = type; el.classList.add('sort-dragging');
        document.addEventListener('mousemove', onMouseMove);
        document.addEventListener('mouseup', onMouseEnd, { once: true });
    }
    function onMouseMove(e) { moveDrag(e.clientY); }
    function onMouseEnd() { document.removeEventListener('mousemove', onMouseMove); endDrag(); }

    function onTouchStart(e, el, type) {
        e.preventDefault(); dragId = el.dataset.id; dragType = type; el.classList.add('sort-dragging');
    }
    function onTouchMove(e) { e.preventDefault(); moveDrag(e.touches[0].clientY); }
    function onTouchEnd() { endDrag(); }

    area.querySelectorAll(':scope > .block-card, :scope > .block-group').forEach(el => {
        const type = el.dataset.type, handle = el.querySelector('.sort-handle');
        if (handle) {
            handle.addEventListener('mousedown', e => onMouseStart(e, el, type));
            handle.addEventListener('touchstart', e => onTouchStart(e, el, type), { passive: false });
        }
        el.addEventListener('touchmove', onTouchMove, { passive: false });
        el.addEventListener('touchend', onTouchEnd);
        el.addEventListener('dragover', e => { e.preventDefault(); moveDrag(e.clientY); });
        el.addEventListener('drop', e => { e.preventDefault(); endDrag(); });
    });

    area._sortCleanup = () => { document.removeEventListener('mousemove', onMouseMove); hideIndicator(); };
}

function applyTopLevelReorder(note, fromId, fromType, toId, toType, before = false) {
    const order = getItemOrder(note);
    const fromIdx = order.findIndex(it => it.id === fromId);
    const toIdx = order.findIndex(it => it.id === toId);
    if (fromIdx < 0 || toIdx < 0) return;
    const moved = order.splice(fromIdx, 1)[0];
    const insertAt = before ? toIdx : toIdx + 1;
    order.splice(insertAt > fromIdx ? insertAt - 1 : insertAt, 0, moved);
    const updated = { ...note, itemOrder: order, updatedAt: new Date().toISOString() };
    state.notes = state.notes.map(n => n.id === note.id ? updated : n);
    persist(); renderHeader(); renderBlocks(); renderNoteList(); WS.send({ type: 'sync', action: 'note_upsert', payload: updated });
}

function copyBlock(b, card) {
    const expanded = expandAliases(b.text);
    navigator.clipboard.writeText(expanded).catch(() => { });
    card.classList.add('flash-copy');
    const badge = document.getElementById('cb-' + b.id);
    if (badge) { badge.classList.add('show'); setTimeout(() => { card.classList.remove('flash-copy'); badge.classList.remove('show'); }, 1300); }
}

function renderAll() { renderNoteList(); renderHeader(); renderBlocks(); }

function getActiveEditingBlockId() {
    const el = document.activeElement;
    if (!el || !el.classList || !el.classList.contains('block-edit-ta')) return null;
    return el.closest('.block-card')?.dataset.id || null;
}

function syncActiveTextarea(block, shouldUpdateText) {
    if (!shouldUpdateText) return;
    const card = document.querySelector('.block-card[data-id="' + block.id + '"]');
    const ta = card?.querySelector('.block-edit-ta');
    if (!ta || document.activeElement !== ta || ta.value === block.text) return;
    const start = ta.selectionStart, end = ta.selectionEnd;
    const delta = (block.text || '').length - ta.value.length;
    ta.value = block.text || '';
    const nextStart = Math.max(0, Math.min(ta.value.length, start + delta));
    ta.setSelectionRange(nextStart, Math.max(nextStart, Math.min(ta.value.length, end + delta)));
    ta.style.height = 'auto'; ta.style.height = ta.scrollHeight + 'px';
}

// ===== App =====
const App = {
    newNote() {
        const now = new Date().toISOString();
        const note = { id: uid(), title: '', pinned: false, updatedAt: now, blocks: [], groups: [], itemOrder: [] };
        if (!dispatch('note_upsert', note)) return;
        state.currentNoteId = note.id;
        renderAll(); App.hideSidebar();
        setTimeout(() => document.getElementById('noteTitleInput').focus(), 60);
    },
    deleteNote() {
        const n = currentNote(); if (!n) return;
        if (!confirm('このメモを削除しますか？')) return;
        dispatch('note_delete', { id: n.id });
    },
    toggleNotePin() {
        const n = currentNote(); if (!n) return;
        dispatch('note_upsert', { ...n, pinned: !n.pinned, updatedAt: new Date().toISOString() });
    },
    addBlock() {
        const ta = document.getElementById('newBlockText');
        const text = ta.value.trim(); if (!text) return;
        const note = currentNote(); if (!note) return;
        const now = new Date().toISOString();
        const block = { id: uid(), noteId: note.id, text, pinned: false, createdAt: now, groupId: null };
        const curOrder = getItemOrder(note);
        const newOrder = [{ type: 'block', id: block.id }, ...curOrder];
        const { blocks: _, ...noteWithoutBlocks } = { ...note, itemOrder: newOrder, updatedAt: now };
        dispatch('block_upsert', block);
        dispatch('note_upsert', noteWithoutBlocks);
        ta.value = ''; ta.style.height = '38px';
        document.querySelector('.blocks-wrap').scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
    },
    toggleSortMode() {
        state.sortMode = !state.sortMode;
        const btn = document.getElementById('sortModeBtn');
        const banner = document.getElementById('sortBanner');
        const main = document.getElementById('mainArea');
        const addBar = document.getElementById('addBar');
        const blocksArea = document.getElementById('blocksArea');
        if (blocksArea._sortCleanup) { blocksArea._sortCleanup(); blocksArea._sortCleanup = null; }
        if (state.sortMode) {
            btn.classList.add('active'); banner.classList.add('show');
            main.classList.add('sort-mode-active'); blocksArea.classList.add('sort-mode');
            addBar.style.display = 'none';
        } else {
            btn.classList.remove('active'); banner.classList.remove('show');
            main.classList.remove('sort-mode-active'); blocksArea.classList.remove('sort-mode');
            const n = currentNote(); addBar.style.display = n ? 'flex' : 'none';
        }
        renderBlocks();
    },
    showSidebar() { document.getElementById('sidebar').classList.add('open'); },
    hideSidebar() { document.getElementById('sidebar').classList.remove('open'); },
    openSettings() {
        const s = state.settings;
        document.getElementById('setupUrl').value = s.url || '';
        document.getElementById('setupKey').value = s.key || '';
        document.getElementById('setupRoom').value = s.room || '';
        document.getElementById('blockFontSlider').value = state.ui.blockFont;
        document.getElementById('blockFontVal').textContent = state.ui.blockFont + 'px';
        document.getElementById('groupFontSlider').value = state.ui.groupFont;
        document.getElementById('groupFontVal').textContent = state.ui.groupFont + 'px';
        document.getElementById('setupModal').classList.remove('hidden');
    },
    closeSettings() { document.getElementById('setupModal').classList.add('hidden'); },
    saveSettings() {
        const url = document.getElementById('setupUrl').value.trim().replace(/\/$/, '');
        const key = document.getElementById('setupKey').value.trim();
        const room = document.getElementById('setupRoom').value.trim();
        state.ui.blockFont = parseFloat(document.getElementById('blockFontSlider').value);
        state.ui.groupFont = parseInt(document.getElementById('groupFontSlider').value);
        applyUiSettings();
        if (!url || !room) { showToast('URLとルームIDは必須です'); return; }
        state.settings = { url, key, room }; Store.set('cn_settings', state.settings);
        App.closeSettings(); updateRoomInfo(); WS.reset(); loadFromServer();
    },
    logout() {
        if (!confirm('ログアウトしますか？\nサーバー設定とローカルデータが削除されます。')) return;
        WS.disconnect();
        state.settings = { url: '', key: '', room: '' }; state.notes = []; state.currentNoteId = null;
        Store.set('cn_settings', state.settings); Store.remove('cn_notes');
        updateRoomInfo(); renderAll(); document.getElementById('setupModal').classList.remove('hidden');
    },
    exportCurrentNote() {
        const note = currentNote();
        if (!note) { showToast('エクスポートするメモを選択してください'); return; }
        downloadJSON(note, 'clipnote-' + ((note.title || 'untitled').replace(/[^\w\-]/g, '_')) + '.json');
        showToast('エクスポートしました');
    },
    exportAllNotes() {
        downloadJSON({ notes: state.notes, exportedAt: new Date().toISOString() }, 'clipnote-all.json');
        showToast('全メモをエクスポートしました');
    },
    importNotes() {
        const input = document.createElement('input');
        input.type = 'file'; input.accept = '.json';
        input.addEventListener('change', async () => {
            const file = input.files[0]; if (!file) return;
            try {
                const text = await file.text();
                const data = JSON.parse(text);
                const now = new Date().toISOString();
                const incoming = Array.isArray(data.notes) ? data.notes : [data];
                if (!incoming.length || !incoming[0].id) { showToast('無効なファイル形式です'); return; }
                let added = 0;
                for (const note of incoming) {
                    const noteId = uid(); const idMap = {};
                    const newBlocks = (note.blocks || []).map(b => {
                        const newId = uid(); idMap[b.id] = newId;
                        return { ...b, id: newId, noteId, groupId: b.groupId || null };
                    });
                    const newGroups = (note.groups || []).map(g => {
                        const newId = uid(); idMap[g.id] = newId;
                        return { ...g, id: newId };
                    });
                    const remappedBlocks = newBlocks.map(b => ({ ...b, groupId: b.groupId ? (idMap[b.groupId] || null) : null }));
                    const newItemOrder = (note.itemOrder || []).map(item => ({ ...item, id: idMap[item.id] })).filter(item => item.id);
                    const importedNote = {
                        id: noteId, title: (note.title || '無題のメモ') + ' (インポート)',
                        pinned: false, updatedAt: now, blocks: remappedBlocks, groups: newGroups, itemOrder: newItemOrder,
                    };
                    dispatch('note_upsert', importedNote);
                    for (const b of remappedBlocks) dispatch('block_upsert', { ...b, noteId });
                    added++;
                }
                showToast(`インポート完了: ${added}件追加`);
                sortNotes(); renderAll();
            } catch (e) {
                console.warn('import error', e); showToast('インポートに失敗しました');
            }
        });
        input.click();
    },

    // ===== Alias Modal =====
    openAliasModal() {
        // localStorageから最新を読み込む（サーバー同期済みのはず）
        aliases = AliasStore.load();
        renderAliasTable();
        document.getElementById('aliasModal').classList.remove('hidden');
    },
    closeAliasModal() {
        document.getElementById('aliasModal').classList.add('hidden');
    },
    addAlias() {
        const keyEl = document.getElementById('aliasNewKey');
        const textEl = document.getElementById('aliasNewText');
        const key = keyEl.value.trim().toUpperCase();
        const text = textEl.value.trim();
        if (!key || !text) { showToast('キーとテキストを入力してください'); return; }
        if (!/^[A-Z]+[0-9]+$/.test(key)) { showToast('キーは大文字アルファベット+数字で入力してください (例: H1, P2)'); return; }
        // dispatch経由でサーバー同期（applySync内でローカルaliasesも更新される）
        dispatch('alias_upsert', { key, text });
        keyEl.value = ''; textEl.value = '';
        showToast((aliases.findIndex(a => a.key === key) >= 0 ? key + ' を更新しました' : key + ' を追加しました'));
    },
    deleteAlias(key) {
        dispatch('alias_delete', { key });
    }
};

function renderAliasTable() {
    const tbody = document.getElementById('aliasTbody');
    tbody.innerHTML = '';
    if (aliases.length === 0) {
        tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="3" class="alias-empty">エイリアスが登録されていません</td></tr>';
        return;
    }
    for (const a of aliases) {
        const tr = document.createElement('tr');
        tr.innerHTML =
            '<td><span class="alias-key-cell">' + esc(a.key) + '</span></td>' +
            '<td class="alias-text-cell">' + esc(a.text) + '</td>' +
            '<td><button class="alias-del-btn" title="削除">' +
            '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" width="14" height="14"><polyline points="3 6 5 6 21 6"/><path d="M19 6l-1 14H6L5 6"/><path d="M10 11v6M14 11v6"/><path d="M9 6V4h6v2"/></svg>' +
            '</button></td>';
        // イベントリスナーで正しく a.key をキャプチャ（data-key属性のescapeバグを回避）
        tr.querySelector('.alias-del-btn').addEventListener('click', () => App.deleteAlias(a.key));
        tbody.appendChild(tr);
    }
}

// ===== Helpers =====
function downloadJSON(data, filename) {
    const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(data, null, 2)], { type: 'application/json' });
    const a = document.createElement('a'); a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob); a.download = filename;
    document.body.appendChild(a); a.click(); document.body.removeChild(a);
}

function updateRoomInfo() {
    const room = state.settings.room;
    const el = document.getElementById('roomInfo'), lb = document.getElementById('roomNameLabel');
    if (room) { lb.textContent = 'ルーム: ' + room; el.style.display = 'flex'; }
    else { el.style.display = 'none'; }
}

function showToast(msg, dur = 2000) {
    const el = document.getElementById('toast'); el.textContent = msg; el.classList.add('show');
    setTimeout(() => el.classList.remove('show'), dur);
}

// ===== Slider events =====
document.getElementById('blockFontSlider').addEventListener('input', function () {
    document.getElementById('blockFontVal').textContent = this.value + 'px';
    document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--block-font-size', this.value + 'px');
});
document.getElementById('groupFontSlider').addEventListener('input', function () {
    document.getElementById('groupFontVal').textContent = this.value + 'px';
    document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--group-font-size', this.value + 'px');
});

// ===== Events =====
document.getElementById('searchInput').addEventListener('input', renderNoteList);
document.getElementById('noteTitleInput').addEventListener('input', function () {
    const n = currentNote(); if (!n) return;
    dispatch('note_upsert', { ...n, title: this.value, updatedAt: new Date().toISOString() });
});
const addTa = document.getElementById('newBlockText');
addTa.addEventListener('keydown', e => { if (e.key === 'Enter' && !e.shiftKey) { e.preventDefault(); App.addBlock(); } });
addTa.addEventListener('input', function () { this.style.height = '38px'; this.style.height = Math.min(this.scrollHeight, 120) + 'px'; });

document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
    if (e.key === 'Enter' && document.activeElement &&
        (document.activeElement.id === 'aliasNewKey' || document.activeElement.id === 'aliasNewText')) {
        e.preventDefault(); App.addAlias();
    }
});

// ===== Boot =====
(function init() {
    loadLocal(); sortNotes();
    if (state.notes.length > 0) state.currentNoteId = state.notes[0].id;
    applyUiSettings(); renderAll(); updateRoomInfo();
    const { url, room } = state.settings;
    if (!url || !room) document.getElementById('setupModal').classList.remove('hidden');
    else { WS.connect(); loadFromServer(); }
})();
</file>

<file path="client/index.html">

            <div class="block-text-wrap">
              <div class="block-text">参照画像と同じ顔と髪。ローアングルで下から見上げるショット。女性が脚を大きく広げて立ち、少し前屈みになり、カメラを直接見ている。
                伸縮性のあるデニム生地でできた極小デニムホットパンツを着用。股間の部分に目立つ星型の切り抜き穴があるが、右手で大胆に股間を覆い、指を 深く強く押し込んで開口部を隠している。左手は胸に当てている。
                太ももの隙間（thigh
                gap）とVラインがはっきり見える。リアルな肌テクスチャ（毛穴が見える）、自然な微かな肌の輝き、微細なディテール。デニム生地のリアルな質感と適度なストレッチ。肌と生地に光沢のあるハイライト。フォトリアリスティック
                <span class="alias-badge alias-badge--defined" title="E1">笑顔にして</span> <span
                  class="alias-badge alias-badge--defined" title="N1">泣かせて</span>
              </div>

                        <path d="M12 17v5M9 3h6l1 7H8L9 3zM8 10l-2 7h12l-2-7"></path>
                      </svg></button><button class="block-act edit-btn" title="編集"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"
                        stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                        <path d="M11 4H4a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v14a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h14a2 2 0 0 0 2-2v-7"></path>
                        <path d="M18.5 2.5a2.121 2.121 0 0 1 3 3L12 15l-4 1 1-4 9.5-9.5z"></path>
                      </svg></button><button class="block-act del-btn" title="削除"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"
                        stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                        <polyline points="3 6 5 6 21 6"></polyline>
                        <path d="M19 6l-1 14H6L5 6"></path>
                        <path d="M10 11v6M14 11v6"></path>
                        <path d="M9 6V4h6v2"></path>
                      </svg></button>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div class="block-text-wrap">
                  <div class="block-text">
                    この画像を編集する。入力画像と全く同じ服装、ソース画像と全く同じ服、後ろ姿。お尻に焦点を当てて前屈みになり、膝を軽く曲げてお尻を突き出す。肩越しに振り返り、カメラ目線。背中を反らせ、腰を極限まで後ろに突き出した姿勢。やや上からのハイアングル、臀部クローズアップ。フレームの下3分の2を尻と太ももで埋め、尻が巨大に強調され曲線が端で切れる。さらにズームイン、シャープなピント、下半身裸、美しい尻、シャワールーム。泡で性器を隠す。薄い陰毛。泡は薄くピンク色が透ける。。
                  </div>
                </div>

                      <div class="grp-picker-item" data-gid="c4778a18-0786-490d-bf2e-941dfd8a0ec8">フェラ</div>
                      <div class="grp-picker-item" data-gid="a97e413c-2db2-4297-b77b-230e0f1ed683">パイズリ</div>
                      <div class="grp-picker-sep"></div>
                      <div class="grp-picker-new" data-new="1"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"
                          stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                          <path d="M12 5v14M5 12h14"></path>
                        </svg>新しいグループ</div>
                    </div><button class="block-act pin-btn" title="ピン留め"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"
                        stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                        <path d="M12 17v5M9 3h6l1 7H8L9 3zM8 10l-2 7h12l-2-7"></path>
                      </svg></button><button class="block-act edit-btn" title="編集"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"
                        stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                        <path d="M11 4H4a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v14a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h14a2 2 0 0 0 2-2v-7"></path>
                        <path d="M18.5 2.5a2.121 2.121 0 0 1 3 3L12 15l-4 1 1-4 9.5-9.5z"></path>
                      </svg></button><button class="block-act del-btn" title="削除"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"
                        stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                        <polyline points="3 6 5 6 21 6"></polyline>
                        <path d="M19 6l-1 14H6L5 6"></path>
                        <path d="M10 11v6M14 11v6"></path>
                        <path d="M9 6V4h6v2"></path>
                      </svg></button>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div class="block-text-wrap">
                  <div class="block-text">
                    この画像を編集する。顔には一切変更を加えない。お尻を突き出し、真後ろからのショット、完全な後ろ姿。カメラは彼女の真後ろに配置し、背中とお尻を完璧に中央に捉えること。画像の下半分は完全に彼女のお尻で埋め尽くされ、画面の下半分を100%占めること。巨大なクローズアップのお尻が画面の下部を完全に覆うこと、
                    両手で尻の肉を広げ、後ろを振り向く。頭を肩越しに後ろに向け、後悔満ちた懇願するような目が確認できる。同じ顔立ち、変わらない背景、全裸。シャワールーム。泡で性器を隠す。薄い陰毛。泡は薄くピンク色が透ける。
                  </div>
                </div>

                </div>

                      </svg></button><button class="block-act edit-btn" title="編集"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"
                        stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                        <path d="M11 4H4a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v14a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h14a2 2 0 0 0 2-2v-7"></path>
                        <path d="M18.5 2.5a2.121 2.121 0 0 1 3 3L12 15l-4 1 1-4 9.5-9.5z"></path>
                      </svg></button><button class="block-act del-btn" title="削除"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"
                        stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                        <polyline points="3 6 5 6 21 6"></polyline>
                        <path d="M19 6l-1 14H6L5 6"></path>
                        <path d="M10 11v6M14 11v6"></path>
                        <path d="M9 6V4h6v2"></path>
                      </svg></button>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div class="block-text-wrap">
                  <div class="block-text">
                    被写体の顔を完全に維持する。男とホテルに行く。明るい環境。半裸。バックで性行為する。胸が完全に露出する。男に両腕を持って引っ張られている。斜め前から撮った写真。男の顔はモザイクががかっている。女の子にフォーカスする。
                  </div>
