                <div class="sort-handle" title="ドラッグで並び替え"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                    stroke-width="2">
                    <line x1="3" y1="8" x2="21" y2="8"></line>
                    <line x1="3" y1="16" x2="21" y2="16"></line>
                  </svg></div>
                <div class="block-header">
                  <div class="block-time"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                      <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"></circle>
                      <polyline points="12 6 12 12 16 14"></polyline>
                    </svg>2026/05/16 12:08</div>
                  <div class="block-actions"><button class="block-act grp-on grp-btn" title="グループ"><svg
                        viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                        <rect x="2" y="3" width="8" height="8" rx="1"></rect>
                        <rect x="14" y="3" width="8" height="8" rx="1"></rect>
                        <rect x="2" y="13" width="8" height="8" rx="1"></rect>
                        <rect x="14" y="13" width="8" height="8" rx="1"></rect>
                      </svg></button>
                    <div class="grp-picker" id="gp-ab977aa6-a53b-470e-9218-e69160523931">
                      <div class="grp-picker-item" data-gid="efb27f4d-21a3-4a09-9275-5e9ad8c06af8">騎乗位</div>
                      <div class="grp-picker-item" data-gid="8f377345-167d-4a4d-971b-a3c87fe0e60b">アブノーマル(まんぐり等)</div>
                      <div class="grp-picker-item" data-gid="bc2d5849-b52b-4274-8b0c-1e462b090276">SOLO</div>
                      <div class="grp-picker-item" data-gid="d7e84dd9-8a11-486b-bfde-fd19e1317708">正常位</div>
                      <div class="grp-picker-item" data-gid="e75f4210-2a52-4f37-a898-ed310b915595">バック</div>
                      <div class="grp-picker-item" data-gid="c4778a18-0786-490d-bf2e-941dfd8a0ec8">フェラ</div>
                      <div class="grp-picker-item cur" data-gid="a97e413c-2db2-4297-b77b-230e0f1ed683">パイズリ</div>
                      <div class="grp-picker-sep"></div>
                      <div class="grp-picker-new" data-new="1"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"
                          stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                          <path d="M12 5v14M5 12h14"></path>
                        </svg>新しいグループ</div>
                    </div><button class="block-act pin-btn" title="ピン留め"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"
                        stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                        <path d="M12 17v5M9 3h6l1 7H8L9 3zM8 10l-2 7h12l-2-7"></path>
                      </svg></button><button class="block-act edit-btn" title="編集"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"
                        stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                        <path d="M11 4H4a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v14a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h14a2 2 0 0 0 2-2v-7"></path>
                        <path d="M18.5 2.5a2.121 2.121 0 0 1 3 3L12 15l-4 1 1-4 9.5-9.5z"></path>
                      </svg></button><button class="block-act del-btn" title="削除"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"
                        stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                        <polyline points="3 6 5 6 21 6"></polyline>
                        <path d="M19 6l-1 14H6L5 6"></path>
                        <path d="M10 11v6M14 11v6"></path>
                        <path d="M9 6V4h6v2"></path>
                      </svg></button>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div class="block-text-wrap">
                  <div class="block-text">全裸にする。男とのツーショット。
                    男が椅子に座り、足を開く。男はズボンを脱ぐ。男の主観画像。女は乳首を出す。
                    女は男の足の間に向かい合わせに屈み、女は男に近づき、両方の乳を男の股間に乗せて密着し、両手で乳の横を持ち男の股間の棒を両乳で挟む。女はカメラを上目遣いで見る。棒の輪郭を黒く塗りつぶして消す。
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div class="block-edit-wrap"><textarea class="block-edit-ta"></textarea>
                  <div class="block-edit-actions"><button class="edit-cancel-btn">キャンセル</button><button
                      class="edit-save-btn">保存</button></div>
                </div>
                <div class="copy-badge" id="cb-ab977aa6-a53b-470e-9218-e69160523931">コピーしました</div>
              </div>
              <div class="group-add-row"><textarea class="group-add-ta" rows="1"
                  placeholder="グループに追加..."></textarea><button class="group-add-btn"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"
                    stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                    <path d="M12 5v14M5 12h14"></path>
                  </svg></button></div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="block-card" data-id="f93ae5e4-925b-4756-a358-225e5ea91122" data-type="block" draggable="false">
            <div class="sort-handle" title="ドラッグで並び替え"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"

              </svg></div>
            <div class="block-header">
              <div class="block-time"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">

                </svg>2026/05/09 21:07</div>
              <div class="block-actions"><button class="block-act grp-btn" title="グループ"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"

{
  "name": "ClipNote",
  "short_name": "ClipNote",
  "description": "マルチデバイス対応ブロック型メモアプリ",
  "start_url": "/",
  "display": "standalone",
  "background_color": "#ffffff",
  "theme_color": "#ffffff",
  "orientation": "any",
  "icons": [
    { "src": "icon-192.png", "sizes": "192x192", "type": "image/png" },

<file path="client/style.css">
/* ===== Reset ===== */
*,
*::before,
*::after {
    box-sizing: border-box;
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
}

/* ===== CSS Variables ===== */
:root {
    --bg: #ffffff;
    --bg2: #f5f5f4;
    --bg3: #eeece8;
    --text: #1c1c1a;
    --text2: #6b6b67;
    --text3: #a8a8a4;
    --border: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.10);
    --border2: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18);
    --blue: #185FA5;
    --blue-bg: #E6F1FB;
    --blue-border: #B5D4F4;
    --green: #0F6E56;
    --green-bg: #E1F5EE;
    --green-border: #9FE1CB;
    --grp: #5BAEDC;
    --grp-bg: rgba(91, 174, 220, 0.07);
    --radius-md: 8px;
    --radius-lg: 12px;
    --sidebar-w: 240px;
    --header-h: 56px;
    --safe-bottom: env(safe-area-inset-bottom, 0px);
    --block-font-size: 13.5px;
    --group-font-size: 22px;
}

@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
    :root {
        --bg: #1c1c1a;
        --bg2: #272725;
        --bg3: #303030;
        --text: #f0ede8;
        --text2: #a0a09c;
        --text3: #686864;
        --border: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.10);
        --border2: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18);
        --blue: #5b9fd4;
        --blue-bg: rgba(24, 95, 165, 0.15);
        --blue-border: rgba(24, 95, 165, 0.4);
        --green: #3ecfa0;
        --green-bg: rgba(15, 110, 86, 0.15);
        --green-border: rgba(15, 110, 86, 0.4);
        --grp: #4a9ec8;
        --grp-bg: rgba(74, 158, 200, 0.09);
    }
}

/* ===== Base ===== */
html,
body {
    height: 100%;
    overflow: hidden;
}

body {
    font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
    background: var(--bg2);
    color: var(--text);
    font-size: 15px;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

button {
    cursor: pointer;
    font-family: inherit;
}

input,
textarea {
    font-family: inherit;
}

input:focus,
textarea:focus {
    outline: none;
}

/* ===== Layout ===== */
.app {
    display: flex;
    height: 100dvh;
    overflow: hidden;
}

/* ===== Sidebar ===== */
.sidebar {
    width: var(--sidebar-w);
    flex-shrink: 0;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    background: var(--bg2);
    border-right: 0.5px solid var(--border);
    overflow: hidden;
}

.sidebar-header {
    padding: 14px 12px 10px;
    border-bottom: 0.5px solid var(--border);
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

.sidebar-top {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.sidebar-title {
    font-size: 16px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--text);
}

.sidebar-status {
    width: 8px;
    height: 8px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--text3);
    transition: background .3s;
}

.sidebar-status.online {
    background: var(--green);
}

.sidebar-status.error {
    background: #e24b4a;
}

.search-wrap {
    position: relative;
}

.search-wrap svg {
    position: absolute;
    left: 9px;
    top: 50%;
    transform: translateY(-50%);
    width: 14px;
    height: 14px;
    color: var(--text3);
    pointer-events: none;
}

#searchInput {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 7px 10px 7px 30px;
    font-size: 13px;
    border-radius: var(--radius-md);
    border: 0.5px solid var(--border);
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--text);
}

#searchInput::placeholder {
    color: var(--text3);
}

.note-list {
    flex: 1;
    overflow-y: auto;
    padding: 6px;
    -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
}

.note-item {
    padding: 9px 10px;
    border-radius: var(--radius-md);
    cursor: pointer;
    margin-bottom: 2px;
    border: 0.5px solid transparent;
    transition: background .1s;
}

.note-item:hover {
    background: var(--bg3);
}

.note-item.active {
    background: var(--bg);
    border-color: var(--border2);
}

.note-item-title {
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 500;
    margin-bottom: 2px;
    white-space: nowrap;
    overflow: hidden;
    text-overflow: ellipsis;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 4px;
    color: var(--text);
}

.note-item-title svg {
    flex-shrink: 0;
    color: var(--text3);
}

.note-item-meta {
    font-size: 11px;
    color: var(--text3);
}

.note-item-preview {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: var(--text2);
    margin-top: 2px;
    white-space: nowrap;
    overflow: hidden;
    text-overflow: ellipsis;
}

.sidebar-footer {
    padding: 10px 12px;
    padding-bottom: calc(10px + var(--safe-bottom));
    border-top: 0.5px solid var(--border);
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

.new-note-btn {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 8px;
    font-size: 13px;
    border-radius: var(--radius-md);
    border: 0.5px solid var(--border2);
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--text);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 6px;
}

.new-note-btn:hover {
    background: var(--bg3);
}

.new-note-btn svg {
    width: 14px;
    height: 14px;
}

.room-info {
    font-size: 11px;
    color: var(--text3);
    padding: 6px 2px 2px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    gap: 6px;
}

.room-info-label {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 4px;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.room-info-label svg {
    flex-shrink: 0;
    width: 11px;
    height: 11px;
}

.room-name {
    overflow: hidden;
    text-overflow: ellipsis;
    white-space: nowrap;
}

.logout-btn {
    flex-shrink: 0;
    font-size: 11px;
    color: var(--text3);
    background: none;
    border: 0.5px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 4px;
    padding: 2px 7px;
    cursor: pointer;
}

.logout-btn:hover {
    color: #e24b4a;
    border-color: #e24b4a;
}

/* ===== Main ===== */
.main {
    flex: 1;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: var(--bg);
    min-width: 0;
}

.main-header {
    height: var(--header-h);
    padding: 0 16px;
    border-bottom: 0.5px solid var(--border);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

/* ===== Alias Badge ===== */
.alias-badge {
    display: inline-block;
    font-size: 0.88em;
    font-weight: 600;
    padding: 1px 7px;
    border-radius: 4px;
    font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
    line-height: 1.6;
    vertical-align: baseline;
    white-space: nowrap;
}

.alias-badge--defined {
    color: var(--blue);
    background: var(--blue-bg);
    border: 0.5px solid var(--blue-border);
}

.alias-badge--undefined {
    color: #c0392b;
    background: rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.08);
    border: 0.5px solid rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.35);
}

@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
    .alias-badge--undefined {
        color: #e57373;
        background: rgba(229, 115, 115, 0.12);
        border-color: rgba(229, 115, 115, 0.35);
    }
}

/* ===== Alias Modal ===== */
.modal--alias {
    max-width: 560px;
    width: min(560px, calc(100vw - 40px));
    overflow-x: hidden;
}

.modal-title-row {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.modal-title-row h2 {
    margin-bottom: 0;
}

.modal-close-btn {
    width: 30px;
    height: 30px;
    border: none;
    background: transparent;
    color: var(--text2);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    border-radius: var(--radius-md);
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

.modal-close-btn:hover {
    background: var(--bg3);
    color: var(--text);
}

.modal-close-btn svg {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
}

.alias-desc {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: var(--text2);
    margin-bottom: 14px;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

.alias-desc code {
    font-family: 'SF Mono', 'Menlo', 'Monaco', 'Consolas', monospace;
    background: var(--bg3);
    padding: 1px 5px;
    border-radius: 3px;
    font-size: 11px;
    color: var(--blue);
}

.alias-add-row {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 8px;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
    align-items: center;
}

/* .modal input[type="text"] の width:100% / margin-bottom を alias-add-row 内で打ち消す */
.alias-add-row input[type="text"] {
    width: auto;
    margin-bottom: 0;
}

.alias-key-input {
    width: 80px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    padding: 8px 10px;
    font-size: 13px;
    border-radius: var(--radius-md);
    border: 0.5px solid var(--border2);
    background: var(--bg2);
    color: var(--text);
    caret-color: var(--text);
    font-family: 'SF Mono', 'Menlo', 'Monaco', 'Consolas', monospace;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 0 !important;
}

.alias-key-input:focus {
    border-color: var(--blue);
    outline: none;
}

.alias-text-input {
    flex: 1 1 160px;
    min-width: 0;
    padding: 8px 10px;
    font-size: 13px;
    border-radius: var(--radius-md);
    border: 0.5px solid var(--border2);
    background: var(--bg2);
    color: var(--text);
    caret-color: var(--text);
    margin-bottom: 0 !important;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

.alias-text-input:focus {
    border-color: var(--blue);
    outline: none;
}

.alias-add-btn {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 5px;
    white-space: nowrap;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    font-size: 13px;
    padding: 8px 14px;
}

.alias-table-wrap {
    border: 0.5px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: var(--radius-md);
    overflow: hidden;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
    max-height: 280px;
    overflow-y: auto;
}

.alias-table {
    width: 100%;
    border-collapse: collapse;
    font-size: 13px;
}

.alias-table thead {
    position: sticky;
    top: 0;
    z-index: 1;
}

.alias-table th {
    background: var(--bg2);
    color: var(--text2);
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: .04em;
    padding: 8px 12px;
    text-align: left;
    border-bottom: 0.5px solid var(--border);
}

.alias-table td {
    padding: 9px 12px;
    border-bottom: 0.5px solid var(--border);
    vertical-align: middle;
}

.alias-table tr:last-child td {
    border-bottom: none;
}

.alias-table tr:hover td {
    background: var(--bg2);
}

.alias-key-cell {
    display: inline-block;
    font-family: 'SF Mono', 'Menlo', 'Monaco', 'Consolas', monospace;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 12px;
    color: var(--blue);
    background: var(--blue-bg);
    border: 0.5px solid var(--blue-border);
    padding: 2px 8px;
    border-radius: 4px;
}

.alias-text-cell {
    color: var(--text);
    word-break: break-all;
}

.alias-del-btn {
    width: 26px;
    height: 26px;
    border: none;
    background: transparent;
    color: var(--text3);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    border-radius: var(--radius-md);
    margin: 0 auto;
}

.alias-del-btn:hover {
    background: rgba(226, 75, 74, 0.1);
    color: #e24b4a;
}

.alias-empty {
    text-align: center;
    color: var(--text3);
    padding: 24px 0;
    font-size: 13px;
}

        "as-table": "^1.0.36",
        "get-source": "^2.0.12"
      }
    },
    "node_modules/stoppable": {
      "version": "1.1.0",
      "resolved": "https://registry.npmjs.org/stoppable/-/stoppable-1.1.0.tgz",
      "integrity": "sha512-KXDYZ9dszj6bzvnEMRYvxgeTHU74QBFL54XKtP3nyMuJ81CFYtABZ3bAzL2EdFUaEwJOBOgENyFj3R7oTzDyyw==",

    "node_modules/tslib": {

      "integrity": "sha512-oJFu94HQb+KVduSUQL7wnpmqnfmLsOA/nAh6b6EH0wCEoK0/mPeXU6c3wKDV83MkOuHPRHtSXKKU99IBazS/2w==",

      "integrity": "sha512-raqeBD6NQK4SkWhQzeYKd1KmIG6dllBOTt55Rmkt4HtI9mwdWtJljnrXjAFUBLTSN67HWrOIZ3EPF4kjUw80Bg==",

    "node_modules/workerd": {

      "resolved": "https://registry.npmjs.org/workerd/-/workerd-1.20250718.0.tgz",
      "integrity": "sha512-kqkIJP/eOfDlUyBzU7joBg+tl8aB25gEAGqDap+nFWb+WHhnooxjGHgxPBy3ipw2hnShPFNOQt5lFRxbwALirg==",
      "dev": true,

<file path="server/package.json">
{
  "name": "clipnote-server",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "private": true,
  "scripts": {
    "deploy": "wrangler deploy && wrangler pages deploy ../client --project-name clipnote",
    "deploy:worker": "wrangler deploy",
    "deploy:client": "wrangler pages deploy ../client --project-name clipnote",
    "dev": "wrangler dev"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "wrangler": "^4.0.0"
  }
}
</file>

<file path="server/src/index.js">
/**
 * ClipNote Server — Cloudflare Workers
 *
 * 環境変数:
 *   API_KEY        : 認証キー (wrangler secret put API_KEY)
 *   ALLOWED_ORIGIN : CORSオリジン制限 (例: https://clipnote-crh.pages.dev)
 *
 * エンドポイント:
 *   WS   /ws/:roomId            リアルタイム同期
 *   GET  /notes/:roomId         メモ一覧 + ブロック + グループ + エイリアス取得
 *   GET  /ping                  ヘルスチェック
 *
 * 修正済み問題:
 *   - DB初期化をDO (room.js) に一元化。index.jsでの二重初期化を廃止
 *   - /notes レスポンスにエイリアスを含めることでデバイス間共有を実現
 */

export { NoteRoom } from './room.js';

// DB初期化はDO側(room.js)が責任を持つため、Workers側では行わない。
// ただしREST GETはDOを経由しないため、最低限のテーブル存在確認のみ行う。
const INIT_SQL = `
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notes (
  id         TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  room_id    TEXT NOT NULL,
  title      TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  pinned     INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  updated_at TEXT NOT NULL,
  item_order TEXT
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS groups (
  id         TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  note_id    TEXT NOT NULL,
  room_id    TEXT NOT NULL,
  title      TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'グループ',
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS blocks (
  id          TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  note_id     TEXT NOT NULL,
  room_id     TEXT NOT NULL,
  text        TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  pinned      INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  created_at  TEXT NOT NULL,
  updated_at  TEXT NOT NULL,
  group_id    TEXT,
  group_order INTEGER
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS aliases (
  room_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  key     TEXT NOT NULL,
  text    TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  PRIMARY KEY (room_id, key)
);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_notes_room   ON notes(room_id, updated_at);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_groups_note  ON groups(note_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_blocks_note  ON blocks(note_id, created_at);
`;

const _dbInitMap = new WeakMap();
async function ensureDb(env) {
  if (!env.DB) return;
  if (!_dbInitMap.has(env)) {
    const promise = env.DB.exec(INIT_SQL).catch(e => {
      _dbInitMap.delete(env);
      throw e;
    });
    _dbInitMap.set(env, promise);
  }
  await _dbInitMap.get(env);
}

export default {
  async fetch(request, env) {
    const url = new URL(request.url);
    const parts = url.pathname.split('/').filter(Boolean);

    if (request.method === 'OPTIONS') return cors(new Response(null, { status: 204 }), env);
    if (url.pathname === '/ping') return cors(new Response('pong'), env);

    const isWsUpgrade = parts[0] === 'ws' && parts[1] &&
      request.headers.get('Upgrade') === 'websocket';

    if (!isWsUpgrade) {
      const authErr = checkAuth(request, env);
      if (authErr) return cors(authErr, env);
    }

    try {
      await ensureDb(env);
    } catch (e) {
      console.error('DB initialization failed:', e);
    }

    // WebSocket → Durable Object へ
    if (isWsUpgrade) {
      const id = env.NOTE_ROOM.idFromName(parts[1]);
      const headers = new Headers(request.headers);
      headers.set('X-Api-Key-Expected', env.API_KEY || '');
      const newReq = new Request(request.url, { headers, cf: request.cf });
      const doResp = await env.NOTE_ROOM.get(id).fetch(newReq);
      if (doResp.status === 101) return doResp;
      return cors(doResp, env);
    }

    // GET /notes/:roomId
    if (request.method === 'GET' && parts[0] === 'notes' && parts[1]) {
      return cors(await handleLoad(env, parts[1]), env);
    }

    return cors(new Response('not found', { status: 404 }), env);
  },
};

// ---------- REST handlers ----------

async function handleLoad(env, roomId) {
  if (!env.DB) return jsonResp({ error: 'DB not configured' }, 500);

  const [notesRes, blocksRes, groupsRes, aliasesRes] = await Promise.all([
    env.DB.prepare(
      `SELECT * FROM notes WHERE room_id=? ORDER BY pinned DESC, updated_at DESC`
    ).bind(roomId).all(),
    env.DB.prepare(
      `SELECT * FROM blocks WHERE room_id=? ORDER BY note_id, created_at DESC`
    ).bind(roomId).all(),
    env.DB.prepare(
      `SELECT * FROM groups WHERE room_id=?`
    ).bind(roomId).all(),
    env.DB.prepare(
      `SELECT key, text FROM aliases WHERE room_id=? ORDER BY key`
    ).bind(roomId).all(),
  ]);

  const blocksByNote = {};
  for (const b of (blocksRes.results || [])) {
    if (!blocksByNote[b.note_id]) blocksByNote[b.note_id] = [];
    blocksByNote[b.note_id].push({
      id: b.id,
      noteId: b.note_id,
      text: b.text,
      pinned: b.pinned === 1,
      createdAt: b.created_at,
      updatedAt: b.updated_at,
      groupId: b.group_id || null,
      groupOrder: b.group_order ?? null,
    });
  }

  const groupsByNote = {};
  for (const g of (groupsRes.results || [])) {
    if (!groupsByNote[g.note_id]) groupsByNote[g.note_id] = [];
    groupsByNote[g.note_id].push({ id: g.id, title: g.title });
  }

  const notes = (notesRes.results || []).map(n => {
    let itemOrder = [];
    if (n.item_order) {
      try { itemOrder = JSON.parse(n.item_order); } catch { }
    }
    return {
      id: n.id,
      title: n.title,
      pinned: n.pinned === 1,
      updatedAt: n.updated_at,
      itemOrder,
      blocks: blocksByNote[n.id] || [],
      groups: groupsByNote[n.id] || [],
    };
  });

  // エイリアスをルームレベルで返す
  const aliases = (aliasesRes.results || []).map(a => ({ key: a.key, text: a.text }));

  return jsonResp({ notes, aliases });
}

// ---------- Auth ----------

function checkAuth(request, env) {
  if (!env.API_KEY) {
    console.error('API_KEY is not configured.');
    return jsonResp({ error: 'server misconfigured' }, 500);
  }
  const key = request.headers.get('X-Api-Key');
  if (key !== env.API_KEY) return jsonResp({ error: 'unauthorized' }, 401);
  return null;
}

// ---------- Helpers ----------

function jsonResp(data, status = 200) {
  return new Response(JSON.stringify(data), {
    status,
    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
  });
}

function cors(res, env) {
  const origin = (env && env.ALLOWED_ORIGIN) ? env.ALLOWED_ORIGIN : '*';
  const h = new Headers(res.headers);
  h.set('Access-Control-Allow-Origin', origin);
  h.set('Access-Control-Allow-Headers', 'Content-Type, X-Api-Key');
  h.set('Access-Control-Allow-Methods', 'GET, POST, DELETE, OPTIONS');
  return new Response(res.body, { status: res.status, headers: h });
}
</file>

<file path="server/src/room.js">
/**
 * NoteRoom — Durable Object
 * WebSocketでメモの変更をリアルタイム同期 + D1へ永続化
 *
 * 修正済み問題:
 *  - DB初期化をDO内で一元管理（index.jsとの二重定義を廃止）
 *  - _dbReady をインスタンス変数ではなく storage に保持し再起動後も安全に
 *  - note_upsert の groups 全DELETE問題 → UPSERT + 孤立レコード削除に変更
 *  - block_upsert で created_at を上書きしないよう修正
 *  - エイリアス同期: aliases テーブル追加・CRUD対応
 */

export class NoteRoom {
  constructor(state, env) {
    this.state = state;
    this.env = env;
    this._dbReady = null;
  }

  async fetch(request) {
    const url = new URL(request.url);
    const parts = url.pathname.split('/').filter(Boolean);

    if (parts[0] === 'ws') {
      if (request.headers.get('Upgrade') !== 'websocket') {
        return new Response('WebSocket required', { status: 426 });
      }
      return this._handleWS(request);
    }

    return new Response('not found', { status: 404 });
  }

  // ---------- WebSocket ----------

  async _handleWS(request) {
    const expectedKey = request.headers.get('X-Api-Key-Expected') || null;

    const [client, server] = Object.values(new WebSocketPair());
    const parts = new URL(request.url).pathname.split('/').filter(Boolean);
    const roomId = parts[1] || '';

    this.state.acceptWebSocket(server, [
      roomId,
      JSON.stringify({ expectedKey, authed: false })
    ]);

    return new Response(null, { status: 101, webSocket: client });
  }

  _getMeta(ws) {
    const tags = this.state.getTags(ws);
    if (!tags || !tags[1]) return { expectedKey: null, authed: false };
    try { return JSON.parse(tags[1]); } catch { return { expectedKey: null, authed: false }; }
  }

  _setAuthed(ws) {
    ws.serializeAttachment({ authed: true });
  }

  _isAuthed(ws) {
    try {
      const att = ws.deserializeAttachment();
      return !!(att && att.authed);
    } catch { return false; }
  }

  async webSocketMessage(ws, message) {
    try {
      const msg = JSON.parse(message);
      const tags = this.state.getTags(ws);
      const roomId = (tags && tags[0]) || '';
      const meta = this._getMeta(ws);

      if (!this._isAuthed(ws)) {
        if (msg.type === 'auth') {
          const ok = !meta.expectedKey || msg.key === meta.expectedKey;
          if (ok) {
            this._setAuthed(ws);
            ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'auth_ok' }));
          } else {
            ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'auth_error', reason: 'invalid key' }));
            ws.close(4001, 'unauthorized');
          }
        }
        return;
      }

      if (msg.type === 'ping') {
        ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'pong' }));
        return;
      }

      if (msg.type === 'sync' && msg.action) {
        const result = await this._handleSync(msg, roomId);
        if (!result.ok) {
          ws.send(JSON.stringify({
            type: 'sync_error',
            clientMsgId: msg.clientMsgId || null,
            action: msg.action,
            error: result.error || 'sync failed'
          }));
          return;
        }
        const json = JSON.stringify(msg);
        for (const s of this.state.getWebSockets()) {
          if (s !== ws && s.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN && this._isAuthed(s)) {
            s.send(json);
          }
        }
      }
    } catch (e) {
      console.warn('ws message error', e);
    }
  }

  async webSocketClose() { }
  async webSocketError() { }

  // ---------- DB ----------

  async _ensureDb() {
    if (!this.env.DB) return;
    if (!this._dbReady) {
      this._dbReady = (async () => {
        // テーブル作成（aliases テーブルを追加）
        const stmts = [
          `CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notes (
            id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
            room_id TEXT NOT NULL,
            title TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
            pinned INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
            updated_at TEXT NOT NULL,
            item_order TEXT
          )`,
          `CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS groups (
            id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
            note_id TEXT NOT NULL,
            room_id TEXT NOT NULL,
            title TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'グループ',
            created_at TEXT NOT NULL
          )`,
          `CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS blocks (
            id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
            note_id TEXT NOT NULL,
            room_id TEXT NOT NULL,
            text TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
            pinned INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
            created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
            updated_at TEXT NOT NULL,
            group_id TEXT,
            group_order INTEGER
          )`,
          // エイリアスはルーム単位で管理
          `CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS aliases (
            room_id TEXT NOT NULL,
            key     TEXT NOT NULL,
            text    TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
            PRIMARY KEY (room_id, key)
          )`,
          `CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_notes_room   ON notes(room_id, updated_at)`,
          `CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_groups_note  ON groups(note_id)`,
          `CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_blocks_note  ON blocks(note_id, created_at)`,
        ];
        for (const sql of stmts) {
          await this.env.DB.prepare(sql).run().catch(() => { });
        }
        // 既存DBへのカラム追加（エラーは無視）
        const alters = [
          `ALTER TABLE notes  ADD COLUMN item_order  TEXT`,
          `ALTER TABLE blocks ADD COLUMN group_id    TEXT`,
          `ALTER TABLE blocks ADD COLUMN group_order INTEGER`,
        ];
        for (const sql of alters) {
          await this.env.DB.prepare(sql).run().catch(() => { });
        }
      })().catch(e => { this._dbReady = null; throw e; });
    }
    await this._dbReady;
  }

  async _handleSync(msg, roomId) {
    if (!this.env.DB) return { ok: false, error: 'DB not configured' };
    try {
      await this._ensureDb();
      const now = new Date().toISOString();
      const { action, payload } = msg;
      const noteUpdatedAt = payload.noteUpdatedAt || payload.updatedAt || now;

      // ---------- note_upsert ----------
      if (action === 'note_upsert') {
        payload.updatedAt = payload.updatedAt || now;
        const itemOrderJson = payload.itemOrder
          ? JSON.stringify(payload.itemOrder)
          : null;

        await this.env.DB.prepare(
          `INSERT INTO notes (id, room_id, title, pinned, updated_at, item_order)
           VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
           ON CONFLICT(id) DO UPDATE SET
             title      = excluded.title,
             pinned     = excluded.pinned,
             updated_at = excluded.updated_at,
             item_order = excluded.item_order
           WHERE excluded.updated_at >= notes.updated_at`
        ).bind(
          payload.id, roomId,
          payload.title || '',
          payload.pinned ? 1 : 0,
          payload.updatedAt,
          itemOrderJson
        ).run();

        // groups: UPSERT + 送られてきたID以外を削除（全DELETE廃止）
        if (payload.groups && Array.isArray(payload.groups)) {
          const incomingIds = payload.groups.map(g => g.id);

          for (const g of payload.groups) {
            await this.env.DB.prepare(
              `INSERT INTO groups (id, note_id, room_id, title, created_at)
               VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
               ON CONFLICT(id) DO UPDATE SET
                 title = excluded.title`
            ).bind(g.id, payload.id, roomId, g.title || 'グループ', now).run();
          }

          // 送られてきたリストに含まれないグループを削除
          if (incomingIds.length > 0) {
            const placeholders = incomingIds.map(() => '?').join(',');
            await this.env.DB.prepare(
              `DELETE FROM groups WHERE note_id=? AND room_id=? AND id NOT IN (${placeholders})`
            ).bind(payload.id, roomId, ...incomingIds).run();
          } else {
            // 空配列 = グループ全削除
            await this.env.DB.prepare(
              `DELETE FROM groups WHERE note_id=? AND room_id=?`
            ).bind(payload.id, roomId).run();
          }
        }

        // blocks の groupId/groupOrder のみ同期（created_at / text は上書きしない）
        if (payload.blocks && Array.isArray(payload.blocks)) {
          for (const b of payload.blocks) {
            await this.env.DB.prepare(
              `INSERT INTO blocks (id, note_id, room_id, text, pinned, created_at, updated_at, group_id, group_order)
               VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
               ON CONFLICT(id) DO UPDATE SET
                 group_id    = excluded.group_id,
                 group_order = excluded.group_order`
            ).bind(
              b.id,
              payload.id,
              roomId,
              b.text || '',
              b.pinned ? 1 : 0,
              b.createdAt || now,
              b.updatedAt || now,
              b.groupId || null,
              b.groupOrder ?? null
            ).run();
          }
        }
      }

      // ---------- note_delete ----------
      if (action === 'note_delete') {
        await this.env.DB.prepare(
          `DELETE FROM notes WHERE id=? AND room_id=?`
        ).bind(payload.id, roomId).run();
        await this.env.DB.prepare(
          `DELETE FROM blocks WHERE note_id=? AND room_id=?`
        ).bind(payload.id, roomId).run();
        await this.env.DB.prepare(
          `DELETE FROM groups WHERE note_id=? AND room_id=?`
        ).bind(payload.id, roomId).run();
      }

      // ---------- block_upsert ----------
      if (action === 'block_upsert') {
        payload.createdAt = payload.createdAt || now;
        payload.updatedAt = payload.updatedAt || now;
        payload.noteUpdatedAt = noteUpdatedAt;
        await this.env.DB.prepare(
          `INSERT INTO blocks (id, note_id, room_id, text, pinned, created_at, updated_at, group_id, group_order)
           VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
           ON CONFLICT(id) DO UPDATE SET
             text        = excluded.text,
             pinned      = excluded.pinned,
             updated_at  = excluded.updated_at,
             group_id    = excluded.group_id,
             group_order = excluded.group_order
           WHERE excluded.updated_at >= blocks.updated_at`
        ).bind(
          payload.id,
          payload.noteId,
          roomId,
          payload.text || '',
          payload.pinned ? 1 : 0,
          payload.createdAt,   // INSERT時のみ使用（UPDATEでは上書きしない）
          payload.updatedAt,
          payload.groupId || null,
          payload.groupOrder ?? null
        ).run();
        await this.env.DB.prepare(
          `UPDATE notes SET updated_at=? WHERE id=? AND room_id=? AND updated_at <= ?`
        ).bind(payload.noteUpdatedAt, payload.noteId, roomId, payload.noteUpdatedAt).run();
      }

      // ---------- block_delete ----------
      if (action === 'block_delete') {
        payload.noteUpdatedAt = noteUpdatedAt;
        await this.env.DB.prepare(
          `DELETE FROM blocks WHERE id=? AND room_id=?`
        ).bind(payload.id, roomId).run();
        await this.env.DB.prepare(
          `UPDATE notes SET updated_at=? WHERE id=? AND room_id=? AND updated_at <= ?`
        ).bind(payload.noteUpdatedAt, payload.noteId, roomId, payload.noteUpdatedAt).run();
      }

      // ---------- alias_upsert ----------
      if (action === 'alias_upsert') {
        // payload: { key, text }
        if (!payload.key) return { ok: false, error: 'alias key required' };
        await this.env.DB.prepare(
          `INSERT INTO aliases (room_id, key, text) VALUES (?, ?, ?)
           ON CONFLICT(room_id, key) DO UPDATE SET text = excluded.text`
        ).bind(roomId, payload.key, payload.text || '').run();
      }

      // ---------- alias_delete ----------
      if (action === 'alias_delete') {
        if (!payload.key) return { ok: false, error: 'alias key required' };
        await this.env.DB.prepare(
          `DELETE FROM aliases WHERE room_id=? AND key=?`
        ).bind(roomId, payload.key).run();
      }

      msg.serverAckAt = new Date().toISOString();
      return { ok: true };
    } catch (e) {
      console.warn('DB sync error', e);
      return { ok: false, error: e && e.message ? e.message : 'DB sync error' };
    }
  }
}
</file>

<file path="server/wrangler.toml">
name = "clipnote"
main = "src/index.js"
compatibility_date = "2025-01-01"
compatibility_flags = ["nodejs_compat"]

[[durable_objects.bindings]]
name = "NOTE_ROOM"
class_name = "NoteRoom"

[[migrations]]
tag = "v1"
new_sqlite_classes = ["NoteRoom"]

[[d1_databases]]
binding = "DB"
database_name = "clipnote-db"
database_id = "a95e8400-092a-4559-95dc-1aed8e87bcb5"
</file>

{
  "$schema": "node_modules/wrangler/config-schema.json",

  "main": "server/src/index.js",
  "compatibility_date": "2026-05-25",
  "compatibility_flags": [
    "nodejs_compat"
  ],
  "observability": {
    "enabled": true
  },
  "assets": {
    "directory": "client"
  },
  "durable_objects": {
    "bindings": [
      {
        "name": "NOTE_ROOM",
        "class_name": "NoteRoom"
      }
    ]
  },
  "migrations": [
    {
      "tag": "v1",
      "new_sqlite_classes": [
        "NoteRoom"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "d1_databases": [
    {
      "binding": "DB",
      "database_name": "clipnote-db",
      "database_id": "a95e8400-092a-4559-95dc-1aed8e87bcb5"
